adventures-of-brave-bob.title: Adventures of Brave Bob
adventures-of-brave-bob.description:
About Adventures of Brave Bob

Adventures of Brave Bob is an action-RPG platformer where a humble knight sets out to rescue a kidnapped princess from a fearsome lilac dragon. Along the way, Bob must battle waves of enemies, collect coins, and train under the guidance of a wise scarecrow mentor. Play this charming adventure game for free right here!

Adventures of Brave Bob Gameplay

Players guide Sir Bob through multiple stages filled with hostile minions, deadly traps, and treasure chests. Each enemy defeated earns experience points and coins that can be spent on armour upgrades, sharper swords, and defensive gear. The game blends hack-and-slash combat with light RPG elements, encouraging players to grind earlier stages for better equipment before tackling harder ones.

Boss encounters punctuate every chapter, each demanding pattern recognition and precise dodging. The final showdown with the dragon is a multi-phase fight that tests everything you have learned. Difficulty ramps up smoothly, making the game accessible to beginners while still challenging veterans.

How to Play Adventures of Brave Bob

Use your mouse to move Bob around the screen. Click to attack enemies when in range. Collect coins dropped by defeated foes and spend them in the upgrade shop between stages. Pay attention to enemy attack patterns — dodging at the right moment is more important than raw damage output. Consecutive hits without taking damage build a combo multiplier that boosts your coin rewards.

Game Features

  • Classic knight-versus-dragon adventure storyline
  • RPG progression with armour and weapon upgrades
  • Multiple enemy types with unique attack patterns
  • Boss fights at the end of each chapter
  • Simple mouse-driven controls suitable for all ages

Embark on Bob's quest, upgrade your gear, and prove that even the humblest knight can slay the mightiest dragon. Play Adventures of Brave Bob now!
intro: A knight, a dragon, and a princess who needs rescuing — your classic adventure begins.
Train hard, upgrade your gear, and prove Bob is more than a lowly squire.
adventures-of-brave-bob.controls: Move Bob

baseball.title: Doodle Baseball
baseball.description:
About Doodle Baseball

Doodle Baseball is a Google Doodle game created for the Fourth of July 2011, celebrating America's favourite pastime with lovable food-mascot characters. A peanut pitches, a hot dog cheers from the dugout, and you step up to the plate with one simple goal — hit the ball. Play this free arcade baseball game right here!

Doodle Baseball Gameplay

The gameplay is stripped to its purest form: watch the pitch, time your swing, and connect with the ball. There are no base runners or fielding mechanics — just batting. Each successful hit earns a point and extends your streak, while three misses end the inning. The peanut pitcher varies delivery speed and trajectory, keeping you on your toes.

As your streak grows, pitches come faster and with more curve, demanding sharper reflexes. The crowd reacts to every hit and miss, adding a festive atmosphere that matches the Independence Day theme. The game tracks your highest score, encouraging repeated attempts to beat your personal best.

How to Play Doodle Baseball

Click the mouse, tap the screen, or press the spacebar to swing the bat. Timing is everything — swing too early and you whiff, swing too late and the ball sails past. Watch the ball leave the pitcher's hand and release your swing when the ball reaches the sweet spot over the plate. There are no other controls — pure timing, pure skill.

Game Features

  • One-button arcade gameplay — anyone can play
  • Charming food-mascot characters and festive animations
  • Progressively faster and trickier pitches
  • Score tracking to beat your personal best
  • Perfect for quick play sessions

Step up to the plate and see how many runs you can score before the fireworks start. Play Doodle Baseball now!
intro: Fast-food mascots step up to the plate in Google's Independence Day Doodle.
Swing at the perfect moment to send hot dogs and peanuts flying.
baseball.controls: Swing the bat or or

basket-random-pro.title: Basket Random Pro
basket-random-pro.description:
About Basket Random Pro

Basket Random Pro is a chaotic two-player basketball game where the rules of physics are more like suggestions. Players control wobbly, ragdoll-style athletes who stumble, leap, and flail their way toward the hoop. The randomness makes every match unpredictable and hilarious. Play this free sports game now!

Basket Random Pro Gameplay

Each round places two teams on a randomly generated court with different conditions — bouncy floors, tiny hoops, giant balls, or even zero gravity. Players control one athlete per team with a single button that makes them jump and shoot simultaneously. The first team to reach the target score wins the round.

The beauty of the game lies in its chaos. Because the physics engine treats every player like a ragdoll, shots that look impossible sometimes swish through the net, while sure-thing layups can go spectacularly wrong. Winning requires adapting to each round's unique modifiers and mastering the art of controlled chaos.

How to Play Basket Random Pro

Player 1 uses the W key to make their athlete jump and shoot. Player 2 uses the Up Arrow key. Each press launches your player into the air — release at the right moment to aim your shot toward the basket. The ball physics change every round, so adjust your timing accordingly. Best played with a friend for maximum laughs.

Game Features

  • Hilarious ragdoll physics that make every match unique
  • Randomly generated court conditions and modifiers
  • Simple one-button controls perfect for local multiplayer
  • Two-player competitive gameplay
  • Multiple rounds with increasing absurdity

Grab a friend, embrace the chaos, and see who can dunk their way to victory. Play Basket Random Pro now!

The unpredictable physics and ever-changing environments ensure that no two matches play the same way, creating endless entertainment value. Whether playing solo against the AI or competing head-to-head with a friend, the combination of random chaos and basketball skill creates laugh-out-loud moments in every single game session.
intro: The most chaotic basketball game ever made — and completely unplayable in the best way.
Each round scrambles the rules; the first to seven wins.
basket-random-pro.controls:
Player 1
Player 1 — jump and shoot

basketball-2012-google-doodle.title: Basketball 2012 Google Doodle
basketball-2012-google-doodle.description:
About Basketball 2012 Google Doodle

Google built this interactive Doodle to celebrate basketball at the 2012 London Olympics. The game challenges you to sink as many baskets as possible within a tight time limit, testing both your aim and your speed. It remains one of the most replayed sports Doodles ever created. Play it for free right here!

Basketball 2012 Gameplay

The court is stripped down to the essentials: you, the ball, and the hoop. Click or tap to set your shot power and angle, then release to launch the ball. Each successful basket adds time to the clock and earns a point, while misses waste precious seconds. As your score climbs, the basket moves further away, demanding more precise aim.

The game rewards consistency over flashiness. Developing a rhythm — shoot, score, adjust — is the key to high scores. Swishes that hit nothing but net feel especially satisfying and often earn bonus time, giving skilled players the chance to chain together long scoring streaks.

How to Play Basketball 2012

Click and hold the mouse button or tap and hold on mobile to set your shot power. The longer you hold, the more power behind the throw. Release to shoot. Aim for the centre of the hoop for the best chance of scoring. Watch the ball's arc carefully and adjust your timing on the next shot. Speed is important — the clock is always ticking.

Game Features

  • Official Google Doodle celebrating the 2012 London Olympics
  • Simple aim-and-shoot mechanics with depth
  • Time-based scoring that rewards consistency
  • Increasing difficulty as the basket moves further away
  • Instant replay appeal — always one more attempt

Channel your inner Olympian and see how many baskets you can sink before the buzzer sounds. Play Basketball 2012 now!
intro: The 2012 London Olympics inspired this one-button basketball Doodle.
Click or press Space to shoot — nail the arc before time runs out.
basketball-2012-google-doodle.controls: Shoot the ball or or

birth-of-hip-hop-doodle-game.title: Birth Of Hip Hop Doodle Game
birth-of-hip-hop-doodle-game.description:
About Birth of Hip Hop Doodle

In August 1973, DJ Kool Herc threw a back-to-school party in the Bronx and invented an entirely new form of music. This Google Doodle celebrates that legendary moment by putting two turntables in your hands. Mix beats, scratch records, and create your own hip-hop masterpiece. Play this free music game now!

Birth of Hip Hop Gameplay

The game presents an interactive DJ booth with two turntables, a crossfader, and a mixer panel. Slide the crossfader to blend between tracks, drag the records to scratch, and adjust volume levels to create your own mix. The interface is intuitive enough for beginners but offers enough depth for players who want to experiment with layering and timing.

A tutorial walks you through the history of hip-hop's birth while teaching you the basics of DJing. Each section introduces a new technique — isolating the break, looping a beat, and scratching over the top. By the end, you are performing a full live mix set.

How to Play Birth of Hip Hop

Click and drag the mixer lever up and down to adjust volume levels. Use the crossfader at the bottom to blend between the two turntables. Click and drag on the records themselves to scratch. The game guides you through each step with on-screen prompts. Follow the instructions to recreate the legendary techniques DJ Kool Herc pioneered.

Game Features

  • Interactive turntables with real scratching and mixing
  • Educational content about the origins of hip-hop
  • Step-by-step tutorial for DJ techniques
  • Authentic sounds and beats from the era
  • Creative freedom to make your own mix

Step behind the decks and experience the moment hip-hop was born. Play the Birth of Hip Hop Doodle now!
intro: DJ Kool Herc threw the party that started hip-hop — and this Doodle puts you on the decks.
Learn to scratch, cross-fade, and build a beat that moves the crowd.
birth-of-hip-hop-doodle-game.controls: Slide the mixer lever or

blob-opera-google-game.title: Blob Opera
blob-opera-google-game.description:
About Blob Opera

Blob Opera was built by Google Arts & Culture using machine learning trained on four real opera singers. The result is a playful musical instrument where four colourful blob characters sing in harmony. Drag them up, down, and sideways to create beautiful choral arrangements with no musical training required. Play for free now!

Blob Opera Gameplay

Four blobs represent the four classic opera voice types: bass, tenor, mezzo-soprano, and soprano. Click and drag any blob up or down to change pitch, and left or right to change vowel sounds. The machine learning model automatically harmonises the other three blobs to match, creating rich four-part harmony from your single input.

There are no wrong notes and no score. Blob Opera is a pure creative sandbox where experimentation is the entire point. Try dragging blobs to extreme pitches, creating rapid vibrato effects, or building slow crescendos. The results range from hauntingly beautiful to hilariously chaotic.

How to Play Blob Opera

Click on any of the four blobs and drag up or down to change the pitch. Drag left or right to shift between vowel sounds like 'ah', 'oh', and 'ee'. The other blobs will harmonise automatically. Experiment with different combinations — try moving multiple blobs in sequence to create melodies, or hold one blob steady while moving others for harmonic effects. Record your creation and share it with friends.

Game Features

  • Machine learning powered by real opera singer recordings
  • Four-part vocal harmony generated in real time
  • No musical knowledge required — anyone can create
  • Record and share your compositions
  • Relaxing, no-pressure creative experience

Unleash your inner conductor and create stunning opera with just a few clicks. Play Blob Opera now!

The machine learning technology behind Blob Opera ensures that every vocal combination sounds musically coherent, regardless of how wildly you drag the blobs around. This seamless blend of artificial intelligence and interactive art creates a genuinely magical experience where everyone becomes a choral composer within seconds of starting.
intro: Four colourful blobs love opera — and you're their conductor.
Drag them up, down, and sideways to shape pitch, vowel, and harmony in real time.
blob-opera-google-game.controls: Conduct the Blob Opera singers

block-champ-10x10.title: Block Champ (10x10)
block-champ-10x10.description:
About Block Champ (10x10)

Block Champ combines the calm of a jigsaw with the tension of Tetris on a 10×10 grid. Three randomly shaped pieces appear at the bottom of the screen — drag each one onto the board and try to complete full rows or columns to clear them. The game ends when no more pieces fit. Play this free puzzle game now!

Block Champ Gameplay

Each turn gives you three block shapes that must all be placed before a new set appears. Completed rows and columns vanish instantly, freeing up space. Ice blocks require two line clears to break, adding a layer of strategy. The scoring system rewards multiple line clears in a single move, encouraging players to set up chain reactions.

As the board fills up, every placement becomes critical. One poorly positioned piece can leave an awkward gap that wastes space and limits future options. The best players think two or three sets ahead, planning where each piece will go before placing anything. Marathon sessions are common — the "just one more turn" effect is powerful.

How to Play Block Champ

Click and drag a block piece from the tray at the bottom onto the 10×10 grid. Complete a full row or column to clear it and score points. Place all three pieces before the next set arrives. Ice tiles need two clears to break. Plan your placements carefully — the game ends when no pieces from the current set can fit on the board.

Game Features

  • Clean 10×10 grid puzzle with satisfying clears
  • Ice block mechanic adds strategic depth
  • Bonus points for multi-line clears
  • No time pressure — think at your own pace
  • Endless gameplay with high score tracking

Test your spatial reasoning and aim for an unbeatable high score. Play Block Champ now!
intro: Drop blocks onto a 10×10 grid, fill rows and columns to clear them, and never fill the board.
The longer your streak, the bigger the bonus — but one bad placement ends everything.
block-champ-10x10.controls: Place pieces on the grid

block-puzzle-2020.title: Block Puzzle 2020
block-puzzle-2020.description:
About Block Puzzle 2020

Block Puzzle 2020 is a relaxing puzzle game where blocks of various shapes slide onto the board at your own pace. Unlike Tetris, there is no timer and no gravity — simply drag each piece to the position you want and clear rows and columns by filling them completely. Play this free brain-training game now!

Block Puzzle 2020 Gameplay

Each round provides a set of block shapes. Drag and drop them onto an 8×8 or 10×10 grid. When any row or column is completely filled, it clears from the board, earning points and creating space for more pieces. Multiple simultaneous clears earn bonus points, rewarding players who plan their placements strategically.

The game has no time limit, making it perfect for unwinding. However, the challenge escalates as the board fills and available spaces shrink. Learning to recognise which shapes complement each other and leaving room for awkward L-shaped or T-shaped pieces is essential for long runs. The relaxing soundtrack and clean visuals create a meditative experience.

How to Play Block Puzzle 2020

Tap or click a block piece and drag it onto the grid. Release to place it. Fill an entire row or column to clear it. You cannot rotate pieces, so you must find the best position for each shape as it is. The game ends when none of the available pieces can fit anywhere on the board. Aim for the highest score possible.

Game Features

  • No timer — play at your own relaxed pace
  • Clean visuals and calming soundtrack
  • Multiple block shapes with increasing complexity
  • Chain-clear bonuses for strategic placement
  • Infinite replayability with score tracking

Clear the board, beat your high score, and enjoy a peaceful puzzle session. Play Block Puzzle 2020 now!
intro: Slot colourful geometric blocks into a grid and clear lines to survive.
Nothing falls automatically — every placement is a choice you own completely.
block-puzzle-2020.controls: Drag and drop a piece or

boba-bubble-tea.title: Boba Bubble Tea
boba-bubble-tea.description:
About Boba Bubble Tea

Bubble tea — or boba — conquered the world from a Taiwanese tea stand in the 1980s, and this Google Doodle celebrates its global journey with a charming interactive experience. Learn about the origins of tapioca pearls, the art of shaking a perfect cup, and the dizzying variety of flavours that define modern boba culture. Play for free right here!

Boba Bubble Tea Gameplay

The Doodle guides you through the story of bubble tea in an engaging, interactive format. Each stage presents a different aspect of boba history and culture — from the first tea stands in Taichung to the global phenomenon it became. Tap through scenes, discover fun facts, and watch colourful animations bring every fizzy, chewy, sweet sip to life.

Along the way you learn about the different tea bases, the variety of toppings from tapioca pearls to fruit jellies, and the creative flavour combinations that have made boba a worldwide sensation. The interactive elements keep you engaged while the educational content makes every moment informative.

How to Play Boba Bubble Tea

Click or tap to interact with each scene. Follow the on-screen prompts to progress through the story. Toggle the music on or off with the Space bar or Enter key. The experience is self-guided — take your time exploring each stage and learning about bubble tea's fascinating history and cultural impact.

Game Features

  • Beautiful illustrated journey through boba history
  • Interactive elements in every scene
  • Educational content about tea culture worldwide
  • Charming animations and colourful art style
  • Relaxing, self-paced experience

Discover the sweet story behind the world's favourite Taiwanese drink. Play the Boba Bubble Tea Doodle now!

The game captures the creativity and joy of bubble tea culture, letting players experiment with flavour combinations they might never try in real life. The adorable art style, satisfying drink-assembly animations, and enthusiastic customer reactions make every successfully served boba order feel like a small but meaningful accomplishment.
intro: Google celebrates the world's favourite Taiwanese drink with a bubble tea making Doodle.
Shake, mix, and pour ingredients in the right order to satisfy every customer.
boba-bubble-tea.controls:
Brew the bubble tea or
Toggle music or

capyloop-snack.title: Capyloop Snack
capyloop-snack.description:
About Capyloop Snack

Capyloop Snack is a momentum-based physics game starring the internet's favourite chill animal — the capybara. Launch your capybara in a direction and watch it roll, bounce, and loop its way toward juicy fruit scattered around each level. Simple to learn, tricky to master. Play for free now!

Capyloop Snack Gameplay

Each level presents a different arrangement of ramps, loops, and platforms with fruit placed in hard-to-reach spots. The capybara rolls according to realistic physics — momentum, gravity, and friction all play a role. Your job is to aim the initial launch and use the environment's geometry to guide the capybara to every piece of fruit.

Early levels teach the basics of momentum and trajectory. Later stages introduce moving platforms, breakable surfaces, and multi-loop sequences that require precise timing. The three-star rating system on each level encourages replaying to find the most efficient paths and collect every fruit in a single run.

How to Play Capyloop Snack

Click or tap to set the direction and power of your capybara's launch. The capybara will roll and bounce through the level based on the physics of the environment. Collect all the fruit to complete the level. Aim for three stars by collecting everything in the fewest attempts. Experiment with different launch angles to find the optimal path.

Game Features

  • Adorable capybara character with smooth rolling physics
  • Multiple levels with increasing complexity
  • Star rating system for replayability
  • Ramps, loops, and moving platforms
  • Simple one-touch controls

Help the hungriest capybara on the internet collect every snack. Play Capyloop Snack now!

The game's cheerful soundtrack and adorable capybara animations make every loop feel rewarding and joyful. With dozens of snack varieties to discover and increasingly complex loop patterns to master, Capyloop Snack keeps you coming back for just one more satisfying round of snack-gathering fun.
intro: A round, very hungry capybara needs your help rolling through a snack-filled maze.
Plan the route first — the capybara won't stop until it hits a wall.
capyloop-snack.controls: Guide the capybara to the fruit

car-football.title: Car Football
car-football.description:
About Car Football

Car Football combines the thrill of high-speed racing with the strategy of football. Drive a rocket-powered car on a pitch and slam an oversized ball into the opponent's goal. It is fast, furious, and wonderfully ridiculous. Play this free two-player sports game now!

Car Football Gameplay

Two cars face off on a football pitch with a giant ball in the centre. Each player drives their car into the ball to push it toward the opponent's goal. The cars have boosted acceleration and can perform aerial manoeuvres to hit the ball at different angles. First to reach the target score wins the match.

The physics engine makes every collision unpredictable and entertaining. A gentle nudge can send the ball rolling slowly, while a full-speed boost hit launches it like a cannonball. Defensive play is just as important as offence — positioning your car between the ball and your goal can save crucial points. The best matches are tight, chaotic affairs with last-second goals.

How to Play Car Football

Player 1 uses WASD keys to steer and accelerate the car. Player 2 uses the arrow keys. Drive into the ball to push it toward the opponent's goal. Use boost for extra speed on critical plays. Position your car defensively when the ball is near your goal. The match ends when one player reaches the winning score.

Game Features

  • Two-player local multiplayer
  • Rocket-powered cars with boost mechanics
  • Realistic ball physics with unpredictable bounces
  • Fast-paced matches perfect for quick sessions
  • Simple controls with deep strategic potential

Start your engine, hit the pitch, and score the winning goal. Play Car Football now!

The fusion of driving physics and football creates moments of genuine brilliance — bicycle-kick goals from mid-air, last-second saves using your car's roof, and chaotic scrambles in front of the goal line. Every match produces memorable highlights that keep players coming back for just one more adrenaline-pumping game.
intro: Forget boots — grab a set of wheels and play football at full throttle.
Rocket-power your car into the ball and smash it past the goalkeeper.
car-football.controls:
Player 1
Player 1 — drive the car

catpad.title: Catpad
catpad.description:
About Catpad

Catpad is a collection of mini-games all starring an adorable cat protagonist. From puzzle challenges to reflex tests, each game offers a different experience united by charming cat-themed visuals and pick-up-and-play simplicity. Play this free mini-game collection now!

Catpad Gameplay

The game hub presents multiple mini-games, each with its own unique mechanic. One moment you are guiding a cat's paw through a maze, the next you are timing jumps across floating platforms. Each mini-game has its own scoring system and difficulty curve, ensuring variety across play sessions.

The challenge lies in mastering each mini-game's specific mechanics. Some test precision and timing, others test spatial awareness and planning. Unlocking new mini-games requires completing earlier ones, creating a natural progression path. The short format of each game makes Catpad perfect for quick play sessions or extended marathon runs through the entire collection.

How to Play Catpad

Use your mouse to guide the cat's paw through each mini-game. Click or tap to interact with objects, jump, or perform actions specific to each challenge. Press R to restart a mini-game if you get stuck. Press Escape for the pause menu. Each mini-game has on-screen instructions explaining its specific controls and objectives.

Game Features

  • Multiple diverse mini-games in one package
  • Adorable cat protagonist and charming art style
  • Progressive difficulty across the collection
  • Quick-play format perfect for short sessions
  • Simple mouse-driven controls for all games

Dive into a world of feline fun with dozens of mini-game challenges. Play Catpad now!

Whether you are a cat lover looking for a cozy game or a puzzle enthusiast seeking a new challenge, Catpad offers a delightful experience that combines adorable characters with genuinely clever level design. Each world introduces fresh surprises that keep the gameplay feeling new and exciting from start to finish. The hand-drawn art style and soothing background music create a wonderfully relaxing atmosphere throughout every stage.
intro: A collection of bite-sized mini-games, all starring the most capable cat in the world.
Reflexes, puzzle-solving, and feline charm — packed into one entertaining package.
catpad.controls:
Guide the cat's paw or
Restart
Pause / Menu

celebrating-johann-sebastian-bach.title: Celebrating Johann Sebastian Bach
celebrating-johann-sebastian-bach.description:
About Celebrating Johann Sebastian Bach

This Google Doodle uses a machine learning model trained on Bach's entire catalogue to harmonise any melody you create into a four-part baroque composition. Write a few notes, press the button, and the AI transforms your tune into something Bach himself might have composed. Play this free music Doodle now!

Celebrating Bach Gameplay

The interface presents a musical staff where you can place notes at different pitches and positions. Once you have composed a short melody, click the harmonise button and the machine learning model generates three additional voices — alto, tenor, and bass — that follow baroque composition rules to complement your tune.

The AI's harmonisations are remarkably sophisticated, following the voice-leading principles and harmonic conventions that define Bach's style. You can edit your melody and re-harmonise as many times as you like, experimenting with how different note choices produce vastly different harmonic results. The educational value is enormous — it is essentially a free composition lesson taught by an AI trained on a genius.

How to Play Celebrating Bach

Click on the musical staff to place notes. Drag notes up or down to change their pitch and left or right to change their position in time. Click the harmonise button (the Doodle logo) to have the AI generate a full four-part arrangement. Listen to the result, then edit your melody and try again. Click on individual voices to mute or solo them.

Game Features

  • Machine learning trained on Bach's complete works
  • Real-time four-part harmonic composition
  • Interactive musical staff for note placement
  • Educational insight into baroque composition rules
  • Infinite creative possibilities

Compose your own melody and let AI turn it into a Bach masterpiece. Play the Celebrating Bach Doodle now!
intro: Google's AI harmonises your melody in the style of Bach — live, in seconds.
Hum a tune, pick some notes, and watch machine learning compose four-part baroque counterpoint.
celebrating-johann-sebastian-bach.controls: Arrange the melody notes or

celebrating-lake-xochimilco.title: Celebrating Lake Xochimilco
celebrating-lake-xochimilco.description:
About Celebrating Lake Xochimilco

Lake Xochimilco is a UNESCO World Heritage Site on the outskirts of Mexico City, home to floating gardens called chinampas and the critically endangered axolotl. This Google Doodle celebrates this unique ecosystem with an interactive photo safari. Snap pictures of the wildlife and explore the lake's rich biodiversity. Play for free now!

Celebrating Lake Xochimilco Gameplay

You navigate a colourful trajinera (traditional boat) through the canals of Xochimilco, photographing the diverse wildlife that lives among the floating gardens. Each scene presents different animals to capture on camera, from axolotls swimming beneath the surface to birds perched in the trees above.

The interactive scenes are rich with detail and educational content. Clicking on different animals reveals fun facts about their habits, habitats, and conservation status. The axolotl — a salamander that can regenerate lost limbs — takes centre stage, with multiple scenes dedicated to highlighting its unique biology and the threats it faces from pollution and urbanisation.

How to Play Celebrating Lake Xochimilco

Click or tap on the screen to snap a photo when you spot an animal. Look carefully — some creatures are well camouflaged among the floating gardens. Click on captured photos to learn more about each species. Navigate between scenes by clicking the forward arrows. Close pop-up information panels by clicking the X button.

Game Features

  • Beautiful illustrated scenes of Lake Xochimilco
  • Interactive wildlife photography gameplay
  • Educational content about endangered species
  • Focus on the critically endangered axolotl
  • Relaxing exploration with no time pressure

Explore one of Mexico's most precious ecosystems and discover its incredible wildlife. Play the Lake Xochimilco Doodle now!

The Doodle beautifully educates players about the ecological importance of Lake Xochimilco and the endangered axolotl, combining environmental awareness with genuinely enjoyable gameplay. The colourful Mexican folk-art visual style makes every moment a feast for the eyes and a celebration of cultural heritage and natural wonders.
intro: Paddle through Mexico's ancient canal system and photograph its extraordinary wildlife.
The axolotl awaits — snap every species to complete your field guide.
celebrating-lake-xochimilco.controls:
Snap a photo or
Close the scene

celebrating-pani-puri.title: Celebrating Pani Puri
celebrating-pani-puri.description:
About Celebrating Pani Puri

Pani puri — crispy hollow shells filled with spiced water, chickpeas, and chutney — is one of India's most iconic street foods. This Google Doodle celebrates the beloved snack with a joyful interactive experience where you assemble the perfect plate of pani puri by choosing the right fillings and flavoured waters. Play for free now!

Celebrating Pani Puri Gameplay

Each round presents you with a plate of empty puri shells and a selection of fillings and flavoured waters to choose from. Your goal is to match the recipe by selecting the correct combination of ingredients for each puri. Get it right and the puri glows with approval; get it wrong and you will need to try again.

As you progress through the rounds, the recipes grow more complex and the selection of fillings expands. You will learn to distinguish your tamarind water from your mint water, your chickpeas from your sprouted moong, and your sweet chutney from your spicy green paste. The vibrant art and playful animations make every successful plate feel like a celebration.

How to Play Celebrating Pani Puri

Click or tap on the ingredients to select them for your puri. Follow the recipe hints to choose the correct combination of fillings and flavoured water. Complete each plate to advance to the next round. Pay attention to the visual cues — each ingredient has a distinct colour and texture that helps you identify it quickly.

Game Features

  • Interactive ingredient-assembly gameplay
  • Educational content about India's street food culture
  • Progressively complex recipes
  • Vibrant art style with playful animations
  • Accessible to all ages and skill levels

Assemble the perfect plate of pani puri and become a street food legend. Play the Celebrating Pani Puri Doodle now!
intro: Assemble the perfect pani puri by choosing the right fillings and flavoured water.
Each round introduces new ingredients — master every recipe to become a street food legend.
celebrating-pani-puri.controls: Pick puri groups

celebrating-petanque.title: Celebrating Pétanque
celebrating-petanque.description:
About Celebrating Pétanque

Pétanque is a classic French boules game played on sun-baked gravel, and this Google Doodle brings the sport to your screen with charming visuals and intuitive controls. Aim and toss your boule as close to the cochonnet (target ball) as possible while blocking your opponent. Play this free sports Doodle now!

Celebrating Pétanque Gameplay

The game follows traditional pétanque rules. Each round, you and your opponent take turns throwing boules toward the small cochonnet. The player whose boule lands closest to the target scores points. You can aim to land near the cochonnet, or strategically knock your opponent's boule away from it.

Aiming requires adjusting both direction and power. A gentle toss lands the boule nearby, while a hard throw can be used for offensive shots that displace the opponent's well-placed boules. The terrain varies between rounds, with different surfaces affecting how far the boule rolls after landing. Reading the surface and adjusting your throw accordingly is key to consistent scoring.

How to Play Celebrating Pétanque

Click and drag to aim your throw — the direction and distance of your drag determine the trajectory and power. Release to throw the boule. After each round, react with an emoji to celebrate a great shot or commiserate a near-miss. The game alternates between you and the opponent until all boules are thrown, then scores are tallied.

Game Features

  • Authentic pétanque rules and scoring
  • Intuitive click-and-drag aiming mechanic
  • Multiple terrain types that affect ball physics
  • Fun emoji reactions after each throw
  • Educational introduction to a beloved French sport

Perfect your aim and outscore the competition on the gravel court. Play the Celebrating Pétanque Doodle now!
intro: The French art of boules arrives in your browser — aim close, knock rivals away.
Master the spin and judge the terrain to dominate the worldwide leaderboard.
celebrating-petanque.controls:
Aim and throw the boule or
Pick a reaction emoji
Open emoji

chamion-island-games.title: Champion Island Games
chamion-island-games.description:
About Champion Island Games

Champion Island Games is the most ambitious Google Doodle ever created, built for the Tokyo 2020 Olympics. It is a full-length RPG adventure where you play as Lucky the calico cat, travelling across a beautiful Japanese-inspired island to challenge seven sport champions. Play this epic free adventure game now!

Champion Island Games Gameplay

The island is an open world you explore freely. Seven champion characters, each representing a different Olympic sport — table tennis, skateboarding, archery, swimming, climbing, marathon, and artistic swimming — await you at different locations. Each champion offers a unique mini-game challenge that you must complete to earn a trophy.

Between challenges, the island is packed with side quests, hidden collectibles, and NPCs who tell stories rooted in Japanese mythology and folklore. The pixel art is exquisite, the soundtrack is atmospheric, and the attention to cultural detail makes exploration rewarding in its own right. Completing all seven challenges and discovering every secret can take several hours.

How to Play Champion Island Games

Use the arrow keys or WASD to move Lucky the cat around the island. Press the spacebar to interact with NPCs, start challenges, and skip dialogue. Each sport mini-game has its own unique controls explained at the start. Explore every corner of the island — hidden paths, underwater caves, and rooftop shortcuts hold secrets and side quests.

Game Features

  • Seven unique sport-themed mini-games
  • Open-world exploration with side quests
  • Beautiful pixel art inspired by Japanese culture
  • Rich storyline rooted in mythology and folklore
  • Hours of content — the longest Google Doodle ever

Join Lucky on an Olympic adventure across Champion Island. Play Champion Island Games now!
intro: A full retro RPG Doodle built for the Tokyo Olympics — seven sports, one legendary island.
Defeat every champion to claim the title of Island Hero.
chamion-island-games.controls:
Move Lucky the cat or
Interact / skip dialogue / start a round

chess1.title: Chess
chess1.description:
About Chess

This browser-based chess game offers a complete, properly implemented chess experience with adjustable AI difficulty. Whether you are a beginner learning the basics or a seasoned player looking for a quick game, the clean interface and responsive AI make it a great way to play. Play for free right here!

Chess Gameplay

The game follows all standard chess rules including castling, en passant, pawn promotion, and stalemate detection. Choose to play as white or black and set the AI difficulty from beginner to competitive. The AI adapts its playing style at each level, making obvious mistakes at lower difficulties while playing sharp tactical chess at higher ones.

Each game is a fresh challenge. The AI does not repeat the same openings, ensuring variety across sessions. Move hints are available for beginners, highlighting legal moves when a piece is selected. The game tracks your move history and allows you to review completed games, making it useful for learning and improvement.

How to Play Chess

Click on a piece to select it, then click on a highlighted square to move it there. Legal moves are shown as dots on the board. To castle, click the king and then click the target square — the rook moves automatically. To promote a pawn, advance it to the opposite end and select your desired piece from the promotion menu.

Game Features

  • Full chess rule implementation including special moves
  • Adjustable AI difficulty from beginner to advanced
  • Move hints for learning players
  • Clean, responsive board interface
  • Game history and move review

Challenge the AI and sharpen your chess skills at any level. Play Chess now!

Whether you are a complete beginner learning how the pieces move or an experienced player looking for a challenging AI opponent, this chess implementation offers a rewarding experience. The clean interface, helpful move highlighting, and adjustable difficulty make it the perfect place to study and improve your chess skills.
intro: Full chess in your browser — play a smart AI or challenge a friend locally.
Sharpen your opening theory, control the centre, and go for the king.
chess1.controls: Drag a piece to move it

chicken-invaders.title: Chicken invaders
chicken-invaders.description:
About Chicken Invaders

The galaxy's greatest threat turned out to be poultry. Chicken Invaders is a Space Invaders-style shoot-em-up where rows of chicken-shaped alien ships descend from the top of the screen and you must blast them all before they reach you. Fast, funny, and endlessly satisfying. Play for free now!

Chicken Invaders Gameplay

Waves of chickens march across the screen in formation, dropping eggs and feathers as projectiles. Pilot your spaceship at the bottom and fire upward to eliminate them before they reach your level. Each wave introduces new chicken formations, faster movement patterns, and tougher boss chickens that absorb multiple hits.

Power-ups drop from defeated chickens, granting weapon upgrades like spread shots, lasers, and homing missiles. Managing your power-ups is crucial — losing a life resets your weapon to the basic single shot, making boss waves significantly harder. The scoring system rewards accuracy and speed, with bonus points for clearing waves without taking damage.

How to Play Chicken Invaders

Move your spaceship left and right with the mouse. The ship fires automatically, or click to fire manually for more control. Collect power-ups that fall from defeated chickens to upgrade your weapons. Avoid eggs and projectiles dropped by the invaders. Boss chickens appear at the end of every few waves and require sustained fire to defeat.

Game Features

  • Classic Space Invaders gameplay with a comedic twist
  • Multiple weapon power-ups and upgrades
  • Increasingly complex chicken formations
  • Boss battles at regular intervals
  • Satisfying shooting mechanics with combo scoring

Save the galaxy from the poultry invasion. Play Chicken Invaders now!

With its vibrant pixel art, ridiculous humour, and satisfying shooting mechanics, Chicken Invaders proves that the space-shooter genre still has plenty of life — especially when the invaders are poultry. The escalating waves and boss encounters ensure every session feels fresh and challenging.
intro: Alien chickens have invaded the galaxy — and only your fighter stands between them and the universe.
Blast through formations of feathered foes and dodge the drumsticks they throw back.
chicken-invaders.controls: Pilot your spaceship

chinese-new-year-snake-game.title: Chinese New Year - Snake Game
chinese-new-year-snake-game.description:
About Chinese New Year Snake Game

Chinese New Year Snake swaps the classic dots for holiday treats: dumplings, tangerines, and red envelopes scatter across the board as your snake slithers to collect them. Created by Google to celebrate the Lunar New Year, this festive take on Snake is charming, colourful, and addictive. Play for free now!

Chinese New Year Snake Gameplay

The rules follow the classic Snake formula — guide your snake around the board, eat the treats to grow longer, and avoid crashing into walls or your own tail. Each treat type has a different point value, with red envelopes being the most valuable. The snake moves faster as it grows, making control increasingly difficult.

Festive decorations and traditional Chinese New Year imagery frame the playing field, creating a warm holiday atmosphere. The game tracks your highest score and the number of treats collected, encouraging repeated plays. Special golden treats occasionally appear for a limited time, offering bonus points to players quick enough to reach them.

How to Play Chinese New Year Snake

Use the arrow keys or swipe on mobile to steer the snake in four directions — up, down, left, and right. Collect treats to grow longer and earn points. Avoid hitting the walls or running into your own tail. Prioritise high-value treats like red envelopes when they appear. The snake speeds up as it grows, so plan your path ahead.

Game Features

  • Classic Snake gameplay with festive Lunar New Year theme
  • Multiple treat types with different point values
  • Bonus golden treats for extra points
  • Increasing speed as the snake grows longer
  • Beautiful Chinese New Year decorations and art

Celebrate the Lunar New Year by guiding your snake to the highest score. Play now!
intro: A festive Snake dressed up for the Lunar New Year — collect treats, avoid your own tail.
The dragon-snake grows with every sweet it swallows, making every move more perilous.
chinese-new-year-snake-game.controls: Steer the snake or

coffee-craze-sorting-game.title: Coffee Craze - Sorting Game
coffee-craze-sorting-game.description:
About Coffee Craze - Sorting Game

Coffee Craze is a colour-sorting puzzle dressed in a cosy coffee-shop theme. Each level presents you with a set of tall glasses filled with layers of different coloured liquids, and your goal is to pour liquid from one glass to another until every glass contains a single pure colour. Play this free brain-training puzzle now!

Coffee Craze Gameplay

The core mechanic is simple: tap one glass, then tap another to pour the top layer of liquid into it. You can only pour onto a matching colour or into an empty glass. Each level starts with the colours scrambled across multiple glasses, and you must sort them without running out of moves.

Early levels use three or four colours with plenty of empty glasses for manoeuvring. Later levels introduce more colours, taller containers, and fewer empty glasses, demanding careful planning several moves ahead. One careless pour can leave you stuck with no valid moves, forcing a restart. The satisfaction of clearing a complex level with minimal moves is immense.

How to Play Coffee Craze

Click or tap a glass to select it, then click or tap another glass to pour the top layer into it. You can only pour onto a matching colour or into an empty glass. Plan your moves carefully — think about which colours need to go where and work backwards from the solution. Use the undo button if you make a mistake. Complete each level to unlock the next.

Game Features

  • Relaxing colour-sorting puzzle mechanics
  • Cosy coffee-shop visual theme
  • Progressively challenging levels
  • Undo button for correcting mistakes
  • No time pressure — think at your own pace

Sort every glass to perfection and conquer every level. Play Coffee Craze now!
intro: Pour coloured liquids between glasses until each one holds a single pure colour.
Think ahead — one careless pour can leave you stuck with no moves left.
coffee-craze-sorting-game.controls: Sort the coffee boxes or

craft-block-world-building.title: Craft Block World Building
craft-block-world-building.description:
About Craft Block World Building

Craft Block World Building is a voxel sandbox game with no rules and no time limits — just an infinite canvas of colourful cubes waiting for your imagination. Build houses, castles, pixel art, or entire landscapes block by block. Play this free creative sandbox now!

Craft Block World Building Gameplay

The game drops you into an open world made entirely of colourful blocks. Place blocks of any colour anywhere you like to build whatever you can imagine. Remove blocks that are in the way. The building tools are simple and intuitive, making it accessible to players of all ages while offering enough freedom for complex creations.

The world is vast enough for ambitious projects like full-scale castles, pixel art murals, and elaborate landscapes. Different block colours and materials let you add detail and variety to your builds. There is no objective, no enemy, and no fail state — just pure creative freedom in a relaxing, low-pressure environment.

How to Play Craft Block World Building

Use WASD to move the builder around the world. Move the mouse to look around. Press Space to jump. Left-click to place a block and right-click to remove one. Select different block colours from the palette. Explore the world freely and build whatever your imagination can dream up. There are no goals except the ones you set for yourself.

Game Features

  • Infinite voxel sandbox with no restrictions
  • Multiple block colours and materials
  • Simple, intuitive building controls
  • No objectives — pure creative freedom
  • Relaxing gameplay suitable for all ages

Let your creativity run wild in a world made of blocks. Play Craft Block World Building now!

The open-ended creative freedom is what makes Craft Block World Building so compelling — there are no objectives, no time limits, and no wrong answers. Build a modest cottage or a sprawling castle, a quiet village or a bustling metropolis. Your imagination is the only limit, making every session uniquely personal and endlessly creative.
intro: Build anything you can imagine one colourful block at a time.
Place, paint, and stack voxels to grow a tiny house into a sprawling city.
craft-block-world-building.controls:
Move the builder
Look around
Jump
Place a block
Remove a block

dice-roll-protect-the-relic.title: Dice Roll: Protect the Relic
dice-roll-protect-the-relic.description:
About Dice Roll: Protect the Relic

Your ancient tower cradles a priceless relic, and a determined monster army is marching toward it. In this unique tower-defence game, you roll dice to generate units and defences, adding an element of luck to your strategic planning. Play this free strategy game now!

Dice Roll: Protect the Relic Gameplay

Each turn you roll the dice. The result determines what you can build — towers, walls, traps, or special abilities. Place your defences strategically along the path the monsters will take. When the wave begins, your towers fire automatically while you manage special abilities and emergency reinforcements.

The dice mechanic adds unpredictability to every game. Sometimes you roll exactly what you need; other times you must improvise with suboptimal resources. Learning to build effective defences regardless of what the dice give you is the key skill. Later waves introduce flying enemies, armoured tanks, and boss monsters that require specific counter-strategies.

How to Play Dice Roll: Protect the Relic

Click to roll the dice at the start of each turn. Select from the available options and place your defence on the map by clicking a valid tile. Start the wave when you are ready. Watch your defences engage the enemy and use special abilities when they recharge. If monsters reach the relic, you lose health — survive all waves to win.

Game Features

  • Unique dice-based resource generation
  • Strategic tower-defence gameplay
  • Multiple defence types with upgrade paths
  • Diverse enemy types including flying and armoured units
  • Challenging boss waves that test your strategy

Roll the dice, build your defences, and protect the relic at all costs. Play Dice Roll now!

The combination of random dice outcomes and strategic placement decisions creates a game where no two sessions play the same way. Each new roll presents fresh opportunities and challenges, rewarding players who can adapt their strategy on the fly while maintaining long-term defensive planning around the relic.
intro: Roll the dice, deploy your spells, and hold the line against an incoming monster horde.
Every roll is a gamble — every decision shapes whether the relic survives.
dice-roll-protect-the-relic.controls: Roll the dice

dino-swords.title: Dino Swords
dino-swords.description:
About Dino Swords

Dino Swords starts exactly like the Chrome offline dinosaur game you know, then escalates wonderfully: weapons appear on the ground as you run and the dino can pick them up. Swords, maces, lasers, and even a machine gun transform the simple runner into an absurd action game. Play for free now!

Dino Swords Gameplay

The core gameplay remains an endless side-scrolling runner — the dino charges forward, and you jump over cacti and duck under pterodactyls. But scattered across the desert are weapon pickups that change the game entirely. A sword lets you slash through cacti instead of jumping them. A mace smashes obstacles on contact. A laser obliterates everything on screen.

Each weapon has limited durability and eventually breaks, sending you back to dodging the old-fashioned way until the next pickup appears. The contrast between armed invincibility and unarmed vulnerability creates a thrilling rhythm. Experienced players learn the weapon spawn patterns and plan their jumps to grab pickups at the perfect moment.

How to Play Dino Swords

Press Space or the Up Arrow to jump over obstacles. Press the Down Arrow to duck under pterodactyls. Run over weapon pickups on the ground to equip them — the dino uses them automatically. Press number keys 1-6 to switch between collected weapons. Each weapon breaks after a set number of uses, so time your attacks carefully.

Game Features

  • Classic Chrome dino runner with weapon upgrades
  • Multiple weapon types — swords, maces, lasers, guns
  • Weapons break after use, maintaining challenge
  • Same addictive runner gameplay with added combat
  • Hilarious escalation from simple dino to armed warrior

Pick up a sword, slash some cacti, and see how far the armed dino can run. Play Dino Swords now!
intro: The Chrome dino is back — and this time it's armed to the teeth.
Pick up swords, clubs, and shields as you sprint; each weapon changes how you handle obstacles.
dino-swords.controls:
Jump or
Equip a weapon or or or or or or

dinosaur.title: Google Dinosaur Game
dinosaur.description:
About Google Dinosaur Game

When your internet connection drops, Chrome shows you a small pixelated T-Rex in the desert. Press Space to start running — and suddenly you are playing one of the most addictive games ever made. Jump over cacti, duck under pterodactyls, and keep your survival streak alive as the speed steadily climbs. Play it here any time, no broken internet required!

Google Dinosaur Game Gameplay

The T-Rex runs automatically at an ever-increasing speed. Cacti of varying sizes appear as the primary obstacles — small ones can be cleared with a quick tap, while tall clusters require precise timing. After a certain distance, pterodactyls join the mix, flying at different heights that force you to choose between jumping and ducking.

The game cycles between day and night, with the colour palette inverting every few hundred points. The speed caps eventually but remains fast enough to test even the best reflexes. The score maxes out at 99,999 — a milestone very few players have ever achieved. Every run starts from zero with no checkpoints or saves, making consistency the ultimate test.

How to Play Google Dinosaur Game

Press Space or the Up Arrow to make the dino jump. Press the Down Arrow to duck under flying obstacles. The longer you hold the jump button, the higher the dino leaps. Time your inputs carefully — the speed increases as your score grows, and the margin for error shrinks with every hundred points.

Game Features

  • Iconic Chrome browser game playable any time
  • Simple two-button controls — jump and duck
  • Progressive speed increase for endless challenge
  • Day and night visual cycles
  • Score cap at 99,999 for ultimate bragging rights

See how far you can run before the desert catches up. Play the Google Dinosaur Game now!
intro: Chrome's legendary offline dino — jump cacti, duck pterodactyls, and survive forever.
A tiny homage to the pre-internet era, hidden inside every Chrome browser.
dinosaur.controls:
Jump or
Duck

doctor-who-doodle.title: Doctor Who Doodle
doctor-who-doodle.description:
About Doctor Who Doodle

Created to celebrate the 50th anniversary of Doctor Who, this Google Doodle sends you on a puzzle adventure across six decades of the legendary BBC series. Each level is themed around a different Doctor incarnation, with unique enemies, settings, and puzzle mechanics. Play this free adventure Doodle now!

Doctor Who Doodle Gameplay

You navigate the Doctor through grid-based puzzle levels, avoiding Daleks, Cybermen, and other classic villains. Each level requires you to reach the TARDIS while dodging enemies that move in predictable patterns. The key is reading enemy patrol routes and timing your moves to slip through gaps in their coverage.

Six levels represent different eras of Doctor Who, each with distinct visual styles and enemy types. The Daleks move in straight lines, Cybermen patrol set routes, and Weeping Angels only move when you are not looking at them — a brilliantly faithful game mechanic. The difficulty ramps up across the six stages, with the final level combining multiple enemy types in complex configurations.

How to Play Doctor Who Doodle

Use the arrow keys or click to move the Doctor one square at a time. Enemies move after each of your moves, so plan ahead. Reach the TARDIS glowing at the end of each level to progress. Avoid all enemies — one touch and the level restarts. Some levels have power-ups like the Sonic Screwdriver that can temporarily disable enemies.

Game Features

  • Six levels spanning 50 years of Doctor Who history
  • Classic villains including Daleks, Cybermen, and Weeping Angels
  • Turn-based puzzle movement with strategic depth
  • Faithful visual style for each Doctor era
  • Sonic Screwdriver power-ups

Travel through time and outwit the Doctor's greatest enemies. Play the Doctor Who Doodle now!
intro: The TARDIS has been torn apart across time — piece it back together before the Daleks notice.
Journey through six puzzle worlds spanning the entire Doctor Who timeline.
doctor-who-doodle.controls: Move the Doctor or or

doodle-celebrating-loteria.title: Doodle Celebrating Lotería
doodle-celebrating-loteria.description:
About Doodle Celebrating Lotería

Lotería is played at Mexican fiestas, family gatherings, and community events worldwide. This Google Doodle brings the traditional card game to your browser, where an illustrated caller draws cards and you race to mark matching images on your board. Play this free cultural Doodle now!

Celebrating Lotería Gameplay

Each round starts with a tabla (board) showing a grid of illustrated cards — El Sol, La Luna, El Corazón, and more. The caller reveals cards one at a time, and you must quickly spot the matching image on your board and click it to place a bean marker. Complete a winning pattern — row, column, or diagonal — before anyone else to win the round.

The game faithfully reproduces the excitement of real Lotería, where speed and attention are everything. The caller does not wait — miss a card and it is gone. The illustrations are beautifully rendered in the traditional Lotería art style, and each card comes with a short riddle-poem that references its symbolic meaning. Multiple rounds increase in speed, testing your pattern recognition under pressure.

How to Play Celebrating Lotería

Watch the caller reveal each card at the top of the screen. Quickly find the matching image on your tabla and click or tap it to place a bean. Complete a full row, column, or diagonal to win. The caller speeds up in later rounds, so stay focused. Miss too many cards and your opponent will complete their pattern first.

Game Features

  • Authentic Lotería rules and gameplay
  • Beautiful traditional Mexican card illustrations
  • Riddle-poems for each illustrated card
  • Increasing caller speed for growing challenge
  • Multiplayer-style competitive rounds

Experience Mexico's beloved card game right in your browser. Play Celebrating Lotería now!
intro: Mexico's iconic card game — halfway between Bingo and a storytelling tradition.
Match symbols on your board before your online rivals do and shout Lotería!
doodle-celebrating-loteria.controls: Place a bean on your card or

doodle-celebrating-mbira.title: Doodle Celebrating Mbira
doodle-celebrating-mbira.description:
About Doodle Celebrating Mbira

The mbira dzavadzimu is a sacred instrument of the Shona people of Zimbabwe, traditionally used to communicate with ancestors and spirits. This Google Doodle celebrates the mbira's rich cultural heritage by letting you play the instrument yourself, plucking its metal keys to create beautiful melodies. Play for free now!

Celebrating Mbira Gameplay

The interactive mbira is displayed on screen with its metal tines arranged in the traditional layout. Click on individual tines to pluck them and produce authentic mbira tones. The left and right hand rows create different harmonic relationships, allowing you to build complex rhythmic patterns by alternating between them.

The Doodle includes a guided mode that teaches you traditional Shona melodies note by note, as well as a free-play mode where you can compose your own music. The sound engine accurately reproduces the mbira's characteristic buzzing resonance, created by bottle caps traditionally attached to the instrument's soundboard. Educational panels explain the mbira's cultural significance and its role in Shona ceremonies.

How to Play Celebrating Mbira

Click or tap on the mbira's metal tines to pluck them. Each tine produces a different note. Follow the guided tutorial to learn traditional melodies, or experiment freely to create your own. Press Escape for the pause and menu screen. The left-hand and right-hand tines produce complementary notes — alternate between them for authentic mbira rhythms.

Game Features

  • Authentic mbira sound reproduction with buzzing resonance
  • Guided tutorials for traditional Shona melodies
  • Free-play mode for creative exploration
  • Educational content about Shona culture and history
  • Beautiful visual design honouring the instrument

Discover the sacred sounds of the Shona people. Play the Celebrating Mbira Doodle now!

The Doodle makes the mbira's rich musical tradition accessible to a global audience, introducing millions to an instrument and art form that deserves far wider recognition. The interactive music-making experience is both a celebration of Zimbabwean culture and a genuinely enjoyable creative activity for people of all ages and musical backgrounds.
intro: The mbira — Zimbabwe's ancient thumb piano — carries centuries of spiritual meaning.
Pluck its keys in this Doodle and discover a musical tradition unlike any other.
doodle-celebrating-mbira.controls:
Pluck the mbira keys or
Pause / Menu

doodle-clara-rockmore.title: Doodle Clara Rockmore
doodle-clara-rockmore.description:
About Doodle Clara Rockmore

The theremin is one of the oldest electronic instruments — two antennae that sense the position of the performer's hands to control pitch and volume without any physical contact. Clara Rockmore was the instrument's greatest virtuoso, and this Google Doodle lets you play a theremin yourself. Play for free now!

Doodle Clara Rockmore Gameplay

The interactive theremin responds to your mouse position. Move up and down to change pitch, and left and right to adjust volume. The result is a continuous, wavering tone that sounds eerily beautiful when controlled with precision — and hilariously wobbly when you are learning the ropes.

The Doodle includes a guided performance mode where notes light up on screen and you follow them to play famous theremin pieces. A biography section tells Clara Rockmore's remarkable story — how she trained as a classical violinist before discovering the theremin and becoming its foremost performer, touring concert halls worldwide and proving that electronic music could be every bit as expressive as traditional instruments.

How to Play Clara Rockmore Doodle

Move your mouse or finger up and down on the theremin interface to change the pitch — higher position produces higher notes. Move left and right to control volume. Follow the guided notes that light up on screen to play along with famous pieces. Alternatively, experiment freely and create your own theremin compositions.

Game Features

  • Playable virtual theremin with responsive controls
  • Guided performance mode for learning melodies
  • Biography of Clara Rockmore's musical career
  • Authentic theremin sound synthesis
  • Free-play mode for creative experimentation

Play the world's strangest instrument and discover Clara Rockmore's genius. Play the Doodle now!

The Doodle captures the otherworldly quality of theremin music beautifully, allowing anyone to experience the instrument's unique sound without needing any musical training or physical equipment. The combination of interactive music-making and Clara Rockmore's fascinating biography creates an experience that is both entertaining and deeply educational for all ages.
intro: Clara Rockmore was the theremin's greatest virtuoso — an instrument played without touching it.
Wave your cursor through the air to perform a haunting melody in this tribute Doodle.
doodle-clara-rockmore.controls: Play the theremin melody or

doodle-cricket-game.title: Doodle Cricket
doodle-cricket-game.description:
About Doodle Cricket

Doodle Cricket was released by Google to mark the 2017 ICC Champions Trophy. Your team of animated crickets (yes, the insects) faces off against a snail bowling attack on a miniature pitch. It is charming, funny, and captures the essence of cricket batting in a single click. Play this free sports Doodle now!

Doodle Cricket Gameplay

The bowler delivers the ball and you time your click to play a shot. Different timing produces different results — early clicks play pulls and hooks, perfectly timed clicks drive straight, and late clicks edge behind. The animation style uses adorable insect characters that add personality to every delivery.

Scoring works like real cricket: ones, twos, fours, and sixes are possible depending on where and how well you hit the ball. Getting bowled, caught, or run out ends your innings. The target score increases with each round, demanding increasingly aggressive batting. The game captures the fundamental cricket experience — reading the delivery, timing the shot, and chasing a total — in beautifully simple form.

How to Play Doodle Cricket

Click the mouse, tap the screen, or press Space to play a shot when the ball is delivered. The timing of your click determines the type of shot played. Practice reading the ball's trajectory and clicking at the precise moment for maximum runs. Three outs (wickets) end your innings — try to reach the target score before then.

Game Features

  • Official Google Doodle for the 2017 ICC Champions Trophy
  • Adorable cricket-insect character animations
  • Authentic batting mechanics with timing-based shots
  • Progressive target scores that increase difficulty
  • Quick, addictive matches perfect for short breaks

Step up to the crease and bat your way to a century. Play Doodle Cricket now!
intro: Google celebrates the ICC Champions Trophy with an insect cricket match.
Tap at the perfect moment to bat — rack up sixes before getting bowled out.
doodle-cricket-game.controls: Play a shot or or

doodle-crossword-puzzle.title: Doodle Crossword Puzzle
doodle-crossword-puzzle.description:
About Doodle Crossword Puzzle

Google's crossword Doodle is a fully functional classic crossword puzzle with a clean interface that feels like a Sunday broadsheet. Solve across and down clues, fill in the grid letter by letter, and feel the satisfaction of completing every square. Play this free word puzzle now!

Doodle Crossword Gameplay

The puzzle presents a standard crossword grid with numbered squares for across and down clues. Click on a clue to highlight its corresponding squares in the grid, then type your answer. Correct letters lock in place, while incorrect ones can be overwritten. The clues range from straightforward definitions to wordplay and cultural references.

The puzzle difficulty is pitched at an intermediate level — challenging enough to make you think, but accessible enough that most players can complete it with persistence. Cross-referencing letters from intersecting words helps solve trickier clues, rewarding players who work through easier entries first to build up helpful letter fills.

How to Play Doodle Crossword

Click on a clue in the list or directly on a square in the grid to select it. Type your answer using the keyboard. Press Tab or click another clue to switch between entries. Click the same square again to toggle between across and down directions. Use the arrow keys to navigate between squares within a word. Every completed word contributes letters to intersecting words.

Game Features

  • Full-featured crossword puzzle with across and down clues
  • Clean, intuitive grid interface
  • Cross-referencing letter fills for solving help
  • Intermediate difficulty suitable for most solvers
  • Keyboard and mouse navigation support

Challenge your vocabulary and problem-solving skills. Play the Doodle Crossword Puzzle now!

The clean interface and intuitive controls make solving enjoyable on any device, from desktop monitors to mobile phones. Whether you are a crossword veteran or a curious newcomer, the varied difficulty levels and helpful hint system ensure a satisfying and educational puzzle-solving experience every single time.
intro: A proper newspaper-style crossword delivered straight to your browser.
Work through clever clues across and down — no pencil, no eraser, just your brain.
doodle-crossword-puzzle.controls:
Select a clue and line
Flip clue direction or
Navigate the crossword

doodle-earth-day-2020.title: Doodle Earth Day 2020
doodle-earth-day-2020.description:
About Doodle Earth Day 2020

Bees are responsible for pollinating roughly one third of all the food humanity eats, yet their populations are in sharp decline. This Google Earth Day 2020 Doodle celebrates bees by letting you play as one, flying from flower to flower to pollinate a beautiful garden. Play this free nature Doodle now!

Doodle Earth Day 2020 Gameplay

You control a bee buzzing across a colourful garden filled with flowers. Fly to each flower to pollinate it — land on the petals and the flower blooms with a satisfying burst of colour. The goal is to pollinate every flower in the garden before time runs out, covering as much ground as possible with each flight path.

The garden grows larger and more complex with each stage. New flower types require multiple visits to fully pollinate, while wind gusts and obstacles force detours. The educational overlay teaches players about different pollinator species, the threats bees face from pesticides and habitat loss, and what individuals can do to help protect bee populations.

How to Play Earth Day 2020

Click or tap and drag to guide the bee through the garden. Fly over flowers to pollinate them — successfully pollinated flowers bloom and change colour. Cover as many flowers as possible in each run. Follow the on-screen prompts to learn about bee conservation. The bee follows your cursor or finger with a slight physics-based delay, so plan your path smoothly.

Game Features

  • Beautiful illustrated garden environments
  • Relaxing bee-flight gameplay with real pollination mechanics
  • Educational content about bee conservation
  • Multiple stages with growing complexity
  • Earth Day theme promoting environmental awareness

Help save the bees one flower at a time. Play the Earth Day 2020 Doodle now!
intro: Help a bee pollinate flowers and protect the ecosystem in this Earth Day Doodle.
Every flower visited teaches a lesson about why bees matter more than almost anything.

doodle-googles-15th-birthday.title: Doodle Google's 15th Birthday
doodle-googles-15th-birthday.description:
About Google's 15th Birthday Doodle

Released in 2013 to celebrate fifteen years of Google, this birthday Doodle hands you a stick and sets you loose on a spinning piñata. Smash it open to release a shower of candy and confetti in this quick, satisfying arcade game. Play for free right here!

Google's 15th Birthday Gameplay

A colourful piñata shaped like the number 15 swings from a rope at the centre of the screen. Click, tap, or press Space to swing your stick and hit the piñata. Each successful hit sends candy flying and makes the piñata wobble. Multiple rapid hits build a combo that increases the candy shower.

The piñata swings back and forth with physics-based momentum, making timing important. Hit it at the peak of its swing for maximum impact. After enough hits, the piñata breaks open in a spectacular explosion of sweets, confetti, and streamers. The game is deliberately short and sweet — a celebration rather than a challenge — but the satisfying smash makes it worth replaying.

How to Play Google's 15th Birthday

Click the mouse, tap the screen, or press the spacebar to swing the stick at the piñata. Time your swings to connect when the piñata swings toward you. Rapid successive hits build combos for bigger candy showers. Keep hitting until the piñata breaks open completely. Enjoy the celebration!

Game Features

  • Satisfying piñata-smashing gameplay
  • Physics-based swinging and hit detection
  • Colourful candy and confetti explosions
  • Combo system for rapid successive hits
  • Quick, joyful celebration of Google's anniversary

Grab the stick and smash your way to a shower of candy. Play Google's 15th Birthday Doodle now!

The birthday piñata concept is a perfect celebration of Google's milestone, combining interactive fun with nostalgic references that long-time users will appreciate. Each whack reveals something new and unexpected, making the experience feel like unwrapping a present full of digital surprises and joyful memories.
intro: It's Google's 15th birthday and the letters are playing piñata at the party.

doodle-halloween-2020.title: Doodle Halloween 2020
doodle-halloween-2020.description:
About Doodle Halloween 2020

Halloween 2020 sent Magic Cat Academy's beloved wizard cat Momo to the bottom of the ocean, where a new wave of supernatural enemies awaits. This sequel to the original Halloween Doodle expands the spell-drawing mechanic with new enemy types, underwater environments, and an epic boss fight. Play for free now!

Doodle Halloween 2020 Gameplay

Momo faces waves of ocean-themed ghosts, each bearing a symbol above its head. Draw that symbol with your mouse or finger to cast a spell and banish the ghost before it reaches you. New enemy types include jellyfish that require circular spells, octopuses with multi-stroke symbols, and an anglerfish boss with an elaborate spell sequence.

The underwater setting introduces unique visual effects — bubbles, currents, and bioluminescent lighting create a beautiful and eerie atmosphere. Combo chains from the original return, rewarding quick successive banishments with score multipliers and screen-clearing bursts. The difficulty ramp is perfectly calibrated, introducing new threats gradually before overwhelming you with complex multi-enemy waves.

How to Play Halloween 2020

Click and drag the mouse or swipe on mobile to draw the symbol shown above each ghost. Complete the symbol accurately and quickly to banish the ghost. Chain multiple banishments together for combo multipliers. Press Escape to pause. Focus on accuracy over speed — a botched symbol wastes time and lets ghosts advance closer.

Game Features

  • Sequel to the beloved 2016 Magic Cat Academy Doodle
  • Underwater setting with new ocean-themed enemies
  • Expanded spell-drawing mechanics with complex symbols
  • Combo system for score multipliers
  • Epic anglerfish boss battle

Dive deep and defend the ocean from supernatural invaders. Play Halloween 2020 now!

The cooperative multiplayer element makes this Halloween Doodle perfect for playing with friends and family during the spooky season. The vibrant art style, responsive controls, and satisfying team mechanics ensure that every match feels exciting, competitive, and full of Halloween spirit and seasonal fun.

About Doodle Halloween 2022

Halloween 2022 is a frantic multiplayer soul-collecting race. As a ghost floating through a spooky landscape, you must race against other spirits to collect the most souls before time runs out. You control a ghost that floats through a haunted environment filled with glowing soul orbs. Collect as many as possible while competing against AI or other player ghosts doing the same. Souls appear in clusters, and smart pathing — planning routes that maximise collection while minimising wasted movement — is the key to winning.

The map includes shortcuts, hidden areas, and bonus soul clusters that reward exploration. Power-ups temporarily increase your speed or let you steal souls from competitors. The rounds are short and intense, typically lasting under a minute, making it perfect for repeated play. The spooky-cute art style and upbeat soundtrack keep the atmosphere fun rather than frightening.

Use the arrow keys or WASD to move your ghost through the environment. Float over soul orbs to collect them. Navigate toward clusters for efficient collection. Use power-ups when available for speed boosts or soul-stealing abilities. The player with the most souls when time runs out wins the round.

Game Features

  • Charming ghost character animations
  • Power-ups for speed and soul-stealing
  • Hidden shortcuts and bonus areas to discover
  • Short, intense rounds perfect for quick play

Race against rival ghosts and collect the most souls this Halloween. Play now!

The expanded mechanics and cooperative elements make this sequel a worthy successor to the original Magic Cat Academy. Whether playing solo or teaming up with friends, the combination of charming art, responsive spell-casting, and escalating challenges creates an unforgettable Halloween gaming experience for players of all ages.

doodle-history-of-pizza.title: History of Pizza
doodle-history-of-pizza.description:
About History of Pizza

Pizza is far older than most people realise. This educational Google Doodle traces its evolution from ancient Greek flatbreads to the Margherita of Naples to the deep-dish of Chicago. Each level is a fun pizza-slicing challenge that teaches you a chapter of pizza history. Play for free now!

History of Pizza Gameplay

Each stage presents a pizza that needs to be sliced according to specific instructions — into halves, quarters, or custom portions. Swipe or click to draw your cut lines across the pizza surface. The accuracy of your slices determines your score, with bonus points for perfectly even portions and clean cuts.

Between slicing challenges, animated sequences tell the story of pizza's journey around the world. You learn how the tomato arrived from the Americas, why the Margherita was named after a queen, and how Italian immigrants brought their recipes to New York. The combination of gameplay and education makes this Doodle both fun and genuinely informative.

How to Play History of Pizza

Click and drag or swipe across the pizza to make a cut. Follow the on-screen instructions for the required number and angle of slices. Aim for even portions — the closer your cuts are to perfect symmetry, the higher your score. Complete each slicing challenge to unlock the next chapter of pizza history.

Game Features

  • Interactive pizza-slicing challenges
  • Educational journey through 4,000 years of pizza history
  • Accuracy-based scoring for precise cuts
  • Animated historical sequences between levels
  • Beautiful illustrated pizza art in every era

Slice your way through centuries of pizza history. Play the History of Pizza Doodle now!

The combination of cooking gameplay and culinary education makes this one of Google's most satisfying interactive Doodles. Every pizza you create teaches you something new about the history and cultural significance of one of the world's most beloved foods, from ancient flatbreads to modern regional specialties.
intro: Pizza's history stretches from ancient flatbreads to Neapolitan mastery — and this Doodle covers every era.
Play as a pizzaiolo at each stop in history, topping pies in the correct style.
