doodle-jump.title: Doodle Jump unblockeds online
doodle-jump.description:
About Doodle Jump

Doodle Jump is a vertical platformer with deceptively simple controls that became a mobile gaming phenomenon. The Doodler bounces automatically on green platforms — you just tilt or steer left and right to land on the next one, climbing ever higher through a hand-drawn notebook world. Play for free right here!

Doodle Jump Gameplay

The Doodler bounces upward automatically when it lands on a platform. Your job is to steer it left and right to hit the next platform and keep ascending. Green platforms are stable, brown ones break on contact, blue ones slide sideways, and white ones vanish after a single bounce. Learning the properties of each platform type is essential.

Enemies hover between platforms, and shooting them clears the path. Springs and jetpacks provide massive vertical boosts. Black holes suck you in if you drift too close. The notebook-paper aesthetic and hand-drawn art give the game its distinctive charm, while the procedurally generated levels ensure no two runs are identical. Score is measured by height — the higher you go, the better.

How to Play Doodle Jump

Use the left and right arrow keys to steer the Doodler. Press the up arrow or spacebar to shoot at enemies above you. Click or tap to fire as well. Land on every platform to keep bouncing upward — miss one and you fall, ending the run. Grab springs and jetpacks for height boosts. Avoid enemies, UFOs, and black holes.

Game Features

  • Iconic vertical platformer with endless climbing
  • Multiple platform types with unique behaviours
  • Enemies, springs, jetpacks, and black holes
  • Hand-drawn notebook aesthetic
  • Procedurally generated levels for infinite variety

Keep bouncing, keep climbing, and never look down. Play Doodle Jump now!
intro: A little alien bounces upward forever — your job is to keep it from falling.
Jump, shoot, and grab power-ups as platforms get scarcer and enemies get meaner.
doodle-jump.controls:
Steer the alien
Fire or or

doodle-jump-2.title: Doodle Jump 2
doodle-jump-2.description:
About Doodle Jump 2

Doodle Jump 2 takes the classic formula into the cosmos. The Doodler dons a spacesuit and the notebook-paper aesthetic gives way to cosmic backgrounds full of stars, nebulae, and alien worlds. New platform types and enemy behaviour patterns raise the challenge. Play for free now!

Doodle Jump 2 Gameplay

The core mechanic remains: bounce upward on platforms and steer left and right to keep ascending. The space theme introduces gravitational anomalies that pull you toward certain platforms, comet trails that act as moving walkways, and alien enemies with projectile attacks. New power-ups include a rocket that blasts you through multiple screens.

The visual upgrade is significant — the space backgrounds are colourful and dynamic, with planets rotating in the distance and meteor showers creating parallax depth. Despite the new visuals, the gameplay retains the original's tight, addictive feel. The leaderboard encourages competitive play, and the procedural generation ensures every run offers new challenges and opportunities.

How to Play Doodle Jump 2

Use the left and right arrow keys to guide the Doodler. Press the up arrow or spacebar to shoot at enemies. Land on platforms to keep bouncing upward. Avoid enemies and their projectiles. Collect power-ups for height boosts and temporary shields. Watch for gravitational anomalies that alter your trajectory.

Game Features

  • Space-themed sequel with cosmic visuals
  • New platform types including gravity wells
  • Alien enemies with projectile attacks
  • Rocket power-up for massive height boosts
  • Procedurally generated for infinite replayability

Launch into orbit and climb higher than ever before. Play Doodle Jump 2 now!

The sequel builds on everything that made the original a global phenomenon, adding layers of depth while preserving the accessible one-hand gameplay that anyone can pick up instantly. New platform types, themed worlds, and competitive leaderboards ensure there is always a reason to jump back in for another run.
intro: The bouncing alien blasts off into space in this stylish sequel.
New platforms, fresh enemies, and the same irresistible upward pull.

doodle-jump-3.title: Doodle Jump 3
doodle-jump-3.description:
About Doodle Jump 3

Doodle Jump returns with the same irresistible bounce-and-climb formula that made the original a mobile legend. The Doodler launches off green platforms, springs from trampolines, and rides rocket packs through a vertically scrolling world of monsters, UFOs, and treacherous platform gaps. Play for free now!

Doodle Jump 3 Gameplay

Every run is a test of reflexes and risk assessment. Green platforms are safe, but brown ones crumble the instant you touch them. Moving blue platforms slide horizontally, demanding careful timing. Enemies patrol the gaps between platforms — shoot them from below or dodge around them if your aim is off.

The procedural generation ensures no two runs are the same. One attempt might offer a generous chain of springs; the next might present a nightmare gauntlet of crumbling platforms and aggressive enemies. Power-ups appear randomly — jetpacks blast you upward, shields protect against one hit, and magnets pull nearby collectibles toward you. The leaderboard is always watching, and the gap between your current score and your personal best is the ultimate motivator.

How to Play Doodle Jump 3

Press the left and right arrow keys to tilt the Doodler. Press the up arrow or spacebar to fire at enemies above. Land on platforms to bounce upward — miss and you fall. Grab power-ups like jetpacks, springs, and shields. Avoid monsters, UFOs, and black holes that end your run instantly.

Game Features

  • Classic bounce-and-climb platformer gameplay
  • Multiple platform types with unique physics
  • Procedurally generated levels for infinite runs
  • Power-ups including jetpacks, shields, and magnets
  • Competitive leaderboard for score chasing

One more bounce, one more platform, one more record. Play Doodle Jump 3 now!
intro: Bounce ever higher through a gauntlet of monsters, moving platforms, and jetpack rides.
One missed platform ends the run — how high can you climb before gravity wins?

doodle-kids-coding.title: Doodle Kids Coding
doodle-kids-coding.description:
About Doodle Kids Coding

Kids Coding is Google's introduction to computational thinking for young players. The Easter Bunny needs to deliver eggs along a path, and you must arrange coding blocks in the correct sequence to guide it. This Doodle teaches loops, sequences, and conditional logic through play. Play for free now!

Kids Coding Gameplay

Each level presents a path from start to finish with turns, obstacles, and egg collection points. You drag coding blocks — move forward, turn left, turn right, and loop — into a sequence panel. When you press play, the bunny executes your instructions step by step. If the sequence is correct, the bunny collects all eggs and reaches the goal.

The first levels require simple sequences of three or four commands. Later levels introduce loop blocks that repeat a set of instructions, dramatically reducing the number of blocks needed. The final levels require nested loops and conditional thinking — genuine programming concepts presented in an accessible, game-like format. The Doodle has been used in classrooms worldwide to introduce children to coding fundamentals.

How to Play Kids Coding

Drag coding blocks from the toolbox into the sequence panel on the right. Arrange them in order — the bunny will execute each block from top to bottom. Press the play button to run your code. If the bunny collects all eggs and reaches the goal, you pass the level. If not, rearrange your blocks and try again. Use loop blocks to repeat sequences efficiently.

Game Features

  • Visual block-based coding — no typing required
  • Teaches sequences, loops, and conditional logic
  • Six progressively challenging levels
  • Charming Easter Bunny theme and animations
  • Used in classrooms worldwide for coding education

Start your coding journey with the Easter Bunny. Play Kids Coding now!
intro: Help the Easter Bunny deliver eggs by writing a simple program — without a single line of code.
Sequence commands, add loops, and discover the fundamentals of programming through play.
doodle-kids-coding.controls: Drag coding blocks into the sequence

doodle-ludwig-van-beethovens-245th-year.title: Doodle Beethoven
doodle-ludwig-van-beethovens-245th-year.description:
About Doodle Beethoven

Created for Beethoven's 245th birthday, this Doodle casts you as a desperate stagehand racing to recover the composer's scattered score sheets before the concert begins. It is a rhythm puzzle game wrapped in a love letter to classical music history. Play this free music Doodle now!

Doodle Beethoven Gameplay

Beethoven's famous compositions have been jumbled — pages of the score are out of order and scattered across the stage. Each level presents fragments of a famous piece (Für Elise, Moonlight Sonata, Symphony No. 5) and you must arrange them in the correct sequence. Drag the pages into order and press play to hear the result.

When the pages are in the wrong order, the music sounds discordant and wrong. As you get closer to the correct sequence, the harmonies begin to resolve and the piece starts to sound right. The final moment when every page clicks into place and the full composition plays perfectly is deeply satisfying. The Doodle includes brief biographical notes about each piece and its place in Beethoven's career.

How to Play Beethoven Doodle

Click and drag the score sheet pages to rearrange them in the correct order. Press the play button to hear how your arrangement sounds. Listen carefully — the music will guide you toward the correct sequence. When the piece plays perfectly, the level is complete. Each level features a different Beethoven composition with increasing complexity.

Game Features

  • Famous Beethoven compositions including Für Elise and Symphony No. 5
  • Drag-and-arrange puzzle mechanic with musical feedback
  • Biographical notes about each composition
  • Audio-guided solving — listen for correct harmonies
  • Beautiful period-style artwork and animations

Save the concert by reassembling Beethoven's masterworks. Play the Beethoven Doodle now!
intro: Beethoven's sheet music has been scattered by the wind — catch every page before the concert.
A musical puzzle celebrating 245 years of the greatest composer who ever lived.
doodle-ludwig-van-beethovens-245th-year.controls: Arrange the score sheets or

doodle-oskar-fischinger.title: Doodle Oskar Fischinger
doodle-oskar-fischinger.description:
About Doodle Oskar Fischinger

Oskar Fischinger spent decades creating abstract films that moved in perfect synchrony with music — pioneering visual music long before music visualisers existed. This Google Doodle celebrates his art by giving you a canvas to compose your own audiovisual creation. Play for free now!

Oskar Fischinger Doodle Gameplay

The interface presents a timeline grid where you can place geometric shapes — circles, triangles, squares, and lines. Each shape produces a different sound when the playback head reaches it. The vertical position determines pitch, the horizontal position determines timing, and the shape type determines the instrument timbre.

By placing shapes thoughtfully, you can compose surprisingly complex musical pieces that simultaneously create beautiful visual patterns. The interplay between sight and sound is the entire point — Fischinger believed the two were inseparable. Experiment with repetition, symmetry, and rhythm to discover compositions that are both visually striking and musically compelling.

How to Play Oskar Fischinger Doodle

Click on the canvas to choose a shape type, then click on the timeline grid to place it. Shapes higher on the grid produce higher pitches. Press the play button to hear and see your composition. Layer multiple shapes to build complex arrangements. Click on placed shapes to remove or modify them. Experiment freely — there are no wrong compositions.

Game Features

  • Interactive audiovisual composition tool
  • Multiple geometric shapes with unique sounds
  • Position-based pitch and timing control
  • Educational content about Fischinger's pioneering art
  • Infinite creative freedom with no wrong answers

Create your own visual music masterpiece. Play the Oskar Fischinger Doodle now!

Fischinger believed that music and visual art were fundamentally connected, and this Doodle brings that philosophy to life beautifully. The intuitive interface makes creating audio-visual compositions accessible to everyone, from curious children to professional musicians exploring new creative avenues and artistic expressions.
intro: Paint an animated musical canvas in tribute to Oskar Fischinger, pioneer of visual music.
Arrange coloured cells on a grid and press play to watch your composition come alive.
doodle-oskar-fischinger.controls: Choose shapes and build a composition or

doodle-qixi-festival-chilseok.title: Doodle Qixi Festival / Chilseok
doodle-qixi-festival-chilseok.description:
About Doodle Qixi Festival / Chilseok

The Qixi Festival — China's Valentine's Day — is based on the legend of the Cowherd and the Weaver Girl, two lovers separated by the Milky Way who can only meet once a year when magpie birds form a bridge across the stars. This Doodle lets you help the magpies build that bridge. Play for free now!

Qixi Festival Gameplay

You guide flocks of magpies to form a bridge across a beautiful starlit sky. The birds must be positioned carefully to create a continuous path from one side of the Milky Way to the other. Each level presents different star configurations and obstacles — comets that scatter your birds, stellar winds that push them off course, and expanding nebulae that block potential paths.

The story unfolds between levels, telling the full legend of the Cowherd and the Weaver Girl in illustrated panels. The tale of devotion, separation, and annual reunion resonates across Asian cultures — in Korea it is called Chilseok, in Japan Tanabata. The Doodle respectfully presents the shared cultural heritage while celebrating the romantic festival.

How to Play Qixi Festival

Click or tap to guide the magpie birds into position. Arrange them to form a continuous bridge path across the Milky Way. Avoid comets and stellar winds that disrupt your bridge. Complete the bridge to reunite the Cowherd and the Weaver Girl. Each level adds new obstacles and requires more precise placement.

Game Features

  • Beautiful starlit sky with Milky Way visuals
  • Bridge-building puzzle mechanics
  • Illustrated retelling of the Qixi Festival legend
  • Cultural connections to Korean Chilseok and Japanese Tanabata
  • Progressive difficulty with cosmic obstacles

Help the magpies reunite two star-crossed lovers. Play the Qixi Festival Doodle now!
intro: Reunite two star-crossed lovers across the Milky Way in this romantic logic Doodle.
Flip bridges and reroute paths through a celestial puzzle to bring them together.
doodle-qixi-festival-chilseok.controls: Guide the magpie birds

doodle-roswells-66th-anniversary.title: Doodle Roswell's 66th Anniversary
doodle-roswells-66th-anniversary.description:
About Roswell's 66th Anniversary Doodle

On July 8, 1947, the US Air Force announced it had recovered a crashed flying disc near Roswell, New Mexico. This Google Doodle commemorates the 66th anniversary of that mysterious event with a point-and-click puzzle adventure starring a stranded alien trying to repair its crashed spaceship. Play for free now!

Roswell Doodle Gameplay

You play as a small alien who has crash-landed in the New Mexico desert. Your spaceship is broken into several pieces scattered across three distinct scenes — the crash site, a nearby farm, and the town itself. In each scene you must solve environmental puzzles to retrieve ship parts while avoiding detection by suspicious locals and military personnel.

The puzzles require creative thinking and attention to detail. Interact with objects in the environment — move hay bales, distract guard dogs, operate farm machinery — to create paths to your ship pieces. Each scene has multiple solutions, rewarding experimentation. The charming retro-sci-fi art style and humorous animations make the alien's plight both tense and endearing.

How to Play Roswell Doodle

Click on objects in each scene to interact with them. Use the arrow keys to move the alien between scenes. Collect all spaceship parts by solving the environmental puzzles in each location. Combine items to create solutions — some puzzles require using objects found in other scenes. Click on the spaceship to attach recovered parts.

Game Features

  • Three-scene point-and-click puzzle adventure
  • Environmental puzzles with multiple solutions
  • Charming retro-sci-fi art and animations
  • Historical context about the Roswell incident
  • Hidden Easter eggs for thorough explorers

Help the stranded alien repair its ship and escape Roswell. Play the Roswell Doodle now!

The Doodle perfectly captures the playful mystery and conspiracy-theory charm of the Roswell legend. Each puzzle solution feels like uncovering another piece of the mystery, and the retro-sci-fi art style gives the entire experience a whimsical charm that makes solving every puzzle genuinely delightful and rewarding.
intro: A UFO has crashed in Roswell, 1947 — and you're the alien trying to get home.
Collect ship parts, blend in with the suspicious locals, and escape before the government arrives.

doodle-scoville.title: Doodle Scoville
doodle-scoville.description:
About Doodle Scoville

Wilbur Scoville invented the organoleptic test in 1912 to measure the heat of chilli peppers — a scale still used today. This Google Doodle turns the Scoville scale into a boss-fight game where you battle increasingly hot peppers by hurling scoops of cooling ice cream at them. Play for free now!

Doodle Scoville Gameplay

Each level pits you against a different pepper — from mild bell peppers to the legendary Carolina Reaper. The pepper attacks with waves of heat (fireballs, chilli seeds, hot sauce splashes) while you throw scoops of ice cream to cool it down. Each pepper has a health bar that depletes as your ice cream connects, and a unique attack pattern you must learn to dodge.

The progression follows the actual Scoville scale. Early peppers are easy opponents with slow attacks. The jalapeño introduces faster projectiles. The habanero adds area-of-effect heat waves. The final bosses unleash devastating combo attacks that require precise movement and rapid-fire ice cream throws to survive. The educational overlay teaches you each pepper's real Scoville rating and culinary uses.

How to Play Scoville Doodle

Move your character left and right to dodge the pepper's attacks. Click, tap, or press Space to throw ice cream at the pepper. Aim carefully — each hit reduces the pepper's heat meter. Dodge fireballs and heat waves while maintaining your assault. Defeat the pepper before your health runs out to advance to the next, hotter opponent.

Game Features

  • Boss-fight gameplay against increasingly hot peppers
  • Real Scoville scale ratings and pepper facts
  • Unique attack patterns for each pepper boss
  • Ice cream projectile combat mechanics
  • Educational content about chilli pepper history

Can you handle the heat? Battle your way up the Scoville scale. Play the Scoville Doodle now!
intro: Fight your way up the spicy Scoville scale as a mild sweet pepper battling chilli veterans.
Collect milk to soothe the burn, and defeat jalapeños, habaneros, and ghost peppers to win.
doodle-scoville.controls: Hurl ice cream at the pepper or or or or or or or or

doodle-valentines-day.title: Doodle Valentine's Day
doodle-valentines-day.description:
About Doodle Valentine's Day

This Valentine's Day Doodle follows a devoted pangolin on an ingredient-gathering quest across beautiful illustrated landscapes. Roll through forests, climb hills, and navigate natural hazards to collect the components for a very special Valentine's cake — all driven by pure, uncomplicated love. Play for free now!

Valentine's Day Pangolin Gameplay

The pangolin rolls and walks through side-scrolling levels filled with obstacles and collectible ingredients. Each level features a different landscape — forests, mountains, rivers, and meadows — with unique hazards suited to the environment. Collect all ingredients in a level to unlock the next one and move closer to completing the cake.

The controls are simple but the obstacles grow trickier with each stage. Gaps that require precise jumping, moving platforms over rivers, and wind that pushes you off ledges add challenge without overwhelming younger players. The pangolin's charming animations — its determined waddle, triumphant roll, and shy smile — make it impossible not to root for. The finale, delivering the completed cake, is heartwarming.

How to Play Valentine's Day Doodle

Use the arrow keys or A/D to move the pangolin left and right. Press W, Up Arrow, or Space to jump. Press Space to dive underwater in water sections. Collect all the cake ingredients scattered throughout each level. Avoid hazards — falling into pits or hitting obstacles sends you back to the last checkpoint.

Game Features

  • Charming pangolin protagonist on a love-driven quest
  • Multiple beautifully illustrated landscape levels
  • Simple platformer controls accessible to all ages
  • Ingredient collection mechanic with a heartwarming goal
  • Gorgeous art and adorable character animations

Help the pangolin deliver the perfect Valentine's cake. Play the Valentine's Day Doodle now!
intro: A love-struck pangolin needs your help gathering ingredients for the perfect Valentine's cake.
Navigate treacherous terrain, collect every grain, and deliver the gift before the day ends.

doodle-valentines-day-2022.title: Valentine's Day 2022
doodle-valentines-day-2022.description:
About Valentine's Day 2022

Valentine's Day 2022 delivers a satisfying pipe-connection puzzle with a romantic twist. Two hamsters gaze at each other across a screen full of scrambled plumbing. Your job is to rotate individual pipe segments until they form a continuous path from one hamster to the other — creating the tunnel of love they so urgently need. Play for free now!

Valentine's Day 2022 Gameplay

Each level presents a grid of pipe segments — straight pieces, corners, T-junctions, and cross-connectors. The pipes start in random orientations and must be rotated to create one continuous path connecting the two hamsters. Clicking a pipe segment rotates it 90 degrees, and you must work methodically to connect the entire route.

Early levels are gentle warm-ups with small grids and simple pipe configurations. Later stages use larger grids with complex branching networks where multiple dead ends must be untangled before the correct route reveals itself. Some pipes are locked in place, adding constraints that force creative routing. The satisfaction of watching water flow through a completed connection and reunite the hamsters makes every solved puzzle feel like a small victory.

How to Play Valentine's Day 2022

Click or tap on a pipe segment to rotate it 90 degrees clockwise. Rotate all segments until they form a continuous path from one hamster to the other. Work from the endpoints inward — start by connecting pipes near each hamster, then link the two routes in the middle. Locked pipes cannot be rotated and must be incorporated into your solution.

Game Features

  • Satisfying pipe-rotation puzzle mechanics
  • Romantic hamster reunion storyline
  • Progressively complex grid configurations
  • Locked pipe segments for added challenge
  • Water-flow animation on completed connections

Rotate the pipes, build the path, and reunite the lovestruck hamsters. Play Valentine's Day 2022 now!

eiji-tsuburayas-birthday.title: Eiji Tsuburaya’s Birthday
eiji-tsuburayas-birthday.description:
About Eiji Tsuburaya's Birthday Doodle

Eiji Tsuburaya was a genius of practical effects who built the miniature Tokyo that Godzilla destroyed in 1954 and later created the Ultraman franchise. This Google Doodle celebrates his birthday with an interactive monster-movie experience that lets you direct your own tokusatsu scene. Play for free now!

Eiji Tsuburaya Gameplay

The Doodle presents a miniature city set — a faithful recreation of the practical effects stages Tsuburaya pioneered. A kaiju (giant monster) character stands ready to interact with the city, and you trigger actions to create dramatic special-effects moments. Explosions, building collapses, and hero appearances are all at your command.

Each interaction reveals a chapter of Tsuburaya's life and career — from his early work in war films to his groundbreaking techniques for Godzilla to the creation of Ultraman. The attention to detail in recreating the miniature city aesthetic is remarkable, with visible model buildings, tiny cars, and theatrical lighting that honours the practical effects tradition.

How to Play Eiji Tsuburaya Doodle

Click or tap on different elements in the miniature city to trigger special-effects actions. Each click creates a dramatic moment — buildings topple, monsters roar, heroes pose. Explore every clickable element to see all the animations and unlock the full story of Tsuburaya's career. Some interactions chain together for spectacular multi-part sequences.

Game Features

  • Interactive miniature city recreating tokusatsu film sets
  • Multiple clickable elements with unique animations
  • Educational content about Eiji Tsuburaya's career
  • References to Godzilla, Ultraman, and classic kaiju films
  • Beautiful practical-effects aesthetic

Direct your own tokusatsu masterpiece. Play the Eiji Tsuburaya Doodle now!

The Doodle captures the magic and craftsmanship of practical effects filmmaking in a way that digital-only presentations cannot. Every miniature building, tiny explosion, and dramatic monster pose pays loving tribute to the artisan who made audiences believe in giant monsters through sheer skill and creativity.

Position cameras, cue explosions, and bring kaiju battles to life in miniature.

feud.title: Google Feud
feud.description:
About Google Feud

Google Feud is based on a devastating insight: Google's autocomplete suggestions reveal what millions of people are actually thinking about, and the results are simultaneously predictable and completely baffling. Your challenge is to correctly guess the top ten autocomplete completions for real search queries. Play for free now!

Google Feud Gameplay

Each round presents an incomplete Google search query — something like "why does my cat..." or "is it illegal to..." — and you must guess the most popular completions. Type your guess, press Enter, and discover whether your answer appears on the board. You get three strikes before the round ends, and every correct answer earns points based on its ranking.

The game includes multiple categories: culture, people, names, and questions. Each category draws from real autocomplete data, revealing the bizarre, funny, and sometimes touching things millions of people search for every day. The gap between what you think people search for and what they actually search for is the entire joke — and the joke is always on you.

How to Play Google Feud

Select a category from the main menu. Read the incomplete search query at the top of the screen. Type your guess into the text field using the keyboard. Press Enter to submit your answer. If your answer matches one of the top autocomplete results, it appears on the board and you earn points. Three wrong guesses end the round. Aim for the highest score across multiple rounds.

Game Features

  • Real Google autocomplete data for authentic results
  • Multiple categories — culture, people, names, questions
  • Genuinely surprising and often hilarious answers
  • Score tracking across rounds
  • Endlessly replayable with fresh queries

Think you know what the world searches for? Prove it. Play Google Feud now!
intro: Finish Google's autocomplete suggestions before the clock — it's harder and funnier than it looks.
The more you search, the better you'll do. Or maybe not.
feud.controls:
Browse categories
Type your guess
Submit answer

garden-gnomes.title: Garden Gnomes
garden-gnomes.description:
About Garden Gnomes

Garden Gnomes was released in 2018 to celebrate the 150th anniversary of the garden gnome. The gameplay is a perfect physics catapult game where you launch gnomes through the air, aiming for distance and accuracy while collecting flowers mid-flight. Play this free Google Doodle now!

Garden Gnomes Gameplay

Each round starts with a gnome loaded onto a trebuchet in a beautiful garden setting. Adjust the launch angle and power, then release to send the gnome sailing through the air. Mid-flight, the gnome can collect flowers for bonus points, and landing in specific target zones multiplies your score.

The physics are satisfying and consistent — learning the relationship between angle, power, and distance is the core skill. Wind affects trajectory on later levels, adding a variable that experienced players learn to read and compensate for. The garden environments are charming, with different settings for each level featuring unique flower arrangements and target positions. Historical facts about the origin and cultural significance of garden gnomes appear between rounds.

How to Play Garden Gnomes

Click and hold to set your launch power — the longer you hold, the more force behind the throw. Release at the desired angle to launch the gnome. The gnome flies through the air collecting flowers along its path. Aim for target zones on the ground for maximum points. Adjust for wind direction shown by the on-screen indicator. Three launches per round — aim for the best combined score.

Game Features

  • Satisfying trebuchet physics with angle and power control
  • Flower collection for bonus points during flight
  • Target zones for score multipliers
  • Wind mechanics that add challenge
  • Fun historical facts about garden gnome culture

Launch your gnome to glory and set a new distance record. Play Garden Gnomes now!
intro: Load a garden gnome into a giant catapult and launch it as far as humanly possible.
Bounce off trampolines, collect coins mid-flight, and beat your personal distance record.

gold-digger-frvr.title: Gold Digger FRVR
gold-digger-frvr.description:
About Gold Digger FRVR

Gold Digger FRVR is a mining adventure with a satisfying upgrade loop. Guide your drill bit down through layers of rock, collecting gold, diamonds, and other treasures buried deep underground. Spend your earnings on drill upgrades and dig deeper with each run. Play for free now!

Gold Digger FRVR Gameplay

Your drill descends through the earth, carving a path through soil, rock, and stone. Different materials have different hardness — soft dirt is easy, granite takes longer, and some layers are nearly impenetrable without upgraded equipment. Gold nuggets, gems, and rare minerals are scattered throughout, with the most valuable treasures hidden in the deepest layers.

Each run earns you money based on what you collect. Between runs, spend your earnings in the upgrade shop on drill power, fuel capacity, and hull strength. Better equipment lets you reach deeper layers where rarer and more valuable treasures await. The progression loop is addictive — every upgrade meaningfully extends how deep you can go, creating a constant sense of forward momentum.

How to Play Gold Digger FRVR

Use the arrow keys or swipe on mobile to steer the drill left, right, and down through the earth. Collect gold, gems, and treasures as you dig. Monitor your fuel gauge — when it runs out, the run ends. Return to the surface to sell your haul and buy upgrades. Aim for the deepest layers where the rarest treasures are hidden.

Game Features

  • Satisfying mining and digging mechanics
  • Deep upgrade system for drill, fuel, and hull
  • Layered underground with increasing difficulty
  • Rare treasures hidden in the deepest levels
  • Addictive progression loop

Dig deep, strike gold, and upgrade your way to the centre of the earth. Play Gold Digger FRVR now!
intro: Drill through layers of earth, extract gold and silver, and race back to the surface before you're stranded.
Upgrade your rig between runs to dig deeper, haul more, and find buried treasure.

google-cat-game.title: Google Cat Game
google-cat-game.description:
About Google Cat Game

Google's beloved Halloween Doodle stars Momo, a brave little black cat defending the Magic Cat Academy from an invasion of mischievous ghosts. Each phantom floats toward you bearing a glowing symbol — quickly trace that exact shape with your mouse or finger to cast a spell and banish it. Play for free now!

Google Cat Game Gameplay

Waves of ghosts approach from all directions, each displaying a symbol above its head — horizontal lines, vertical lines, V-shapes, and more complex patterns as the game progresses. You must draw the matching symbol with your mouse or finger before the ghost reaches Momo. Successfully traced symbols cast spells that banish the ghost in a puff of sparkles.

As the night deepens, ghosts arrive faster and their symbols grow more intricate, demanding razor-sharp reflexes and precise drawing. Chain multiple banishments together without pausing for screen-clearing combo bursts that rack up massive points. Five spooky levels lead to an unforgettable boss fight against a giant ghost that requires complex multi-stroke symbols to defeat. The charming art and satisfying spell-casting make this one of Google's most polished Doodles.

How to Play Google Cat Game

Click and drag the mouse or swipe on a touchscreen to trace the symbol shown above each approaching ghost. The symbol must be drawn accurately — sloppy traces will not register. Move quickly between ghosts to build combo chains for bonus points. Focus on the closest ghosts first to prevent them from reaching Momo.

Game Features

  • Intuitive symbol-drawing spell-casting mechanic
  • Five levels with escalating difficulty
  • Combo system for massive score multipliers
  • Epic boss battle in the final level
  • Charming Halloween art and animations

Defend the Magic Cat Academy from every ghost that dares enter. Play the Google Cat Game now!
intro: Momo the cat must defend the Magic Cat Academy from waves of symbol-bearing ghosts.
Trace each ghost's symbol to cast a spell — chain combos and survive the night.

google-doodle-football.title: Google Doodle Football
google-doodle-football.description:
About Google Doodle Football

Google's football Doodle for the 2012 London Olympics puts you between the posts for a penalty shootout that never ends. As the goalkeeper, dive left, right, or stay centred to save every shot. The strikers get trickier with every round, testing your reflexes and shot-reading ability. Play for free now!

Google Doodle Football Gameplay

The striker approaches the ball and you must choose your dive direction before the shot is taken. Early rounds feature slow, telegraphed shots aimed at obvious corners. As rounds progress, the strikers wind up faster, disguise their aim, and place shots with increasing precision — including low drives, top-corner screamers, and cheeky chips down the middle.

The timing of your dive is crucial. Dive too early and the striker can change direction. Dive too late and the ball is past you before your character moves. Reading the striker's body language — their run-up angle, plant foot position, and hip rotation — gives subtle clues about shot direction. Saving consecutive shots builds a streak bonus that multiplies your score.

How to Play Google Doodle Football

Use the left and right arrow keys to dive in that direction, or press up to leap upward. On mobile, swipe left, right, or up. Time your dive to match the shot direction. Watch the striker's approach for clues. Saves earn points, with streak bonuses for consecutive saves. The game continues until you concede a goal.

Game Features

  • Official Google Doodle celebrating 2012 Olympics football
  • Goalkeeper gameplay with directional diving
  • Progressively trickier strikers and shot placements
  • Body language clues for shot-reading
  • Streak bonus scoring for consecutive saves

Get between the posts and save every penalty. Play Google Doodle Football now!

Read the kicker's body language and choose your direction before it's too late.

google-maps-snake.title: Google Maps Snake
google-maps-snake.description:
About Google Maps Snake

Released as an April Fools' Day joke in 2019, Google Maps Snake replaced the satellite view with a classic Snake game set inside real-world city maps. Pick up passengers as a train, bus, or rickshaw while growing longer and avoiding your own trail. Play this free Google game now!

Google Maps Snake Gameplay

Choose from several real-world cities — Tokyo, São Paulo, London, Sydney, and more. Each map has its own road layout that forms the Snake playing field. Your vehicle picks up passengers and landmarks, growing longer with each collection. The classic Snake rules apply: hit your own trail or the edge of the map and the game ends.

The maps add a unique twist to traditional Snake gameplay. City layouts create natural corridors and intersections that are both helpful (clear paths) and dangerous (blind corners). Each city has a different feel — Tokyo's dense grid forces tight turns, while São Paulo's winding streets offer longer straightaways. The game tracks high scores per city, encouraging you to master each map's unique layout.

How to Play Google Maps Snake

Use the arrow keys or swipe to steer your vehicle through the city streets. Collect passengers and landmarks to grow longer and earn points. Avoid running into your own trail or the edges of the map. Plan your route ahead — longer vehicles need wider turning paths. Choose different cities for different gameplay experiences.

Game Features

  • Classic Snake gameplay on real Google Maps layouts
  • Multiple real-world cities with unique road patterns
  • Different vehicle types — trains, buses, rickshaws
  • Per-city high score tracking
  • Fun Google April Fools' Day creation

Navigate the world's greatest cities one passenger at a time. Play Google Maps Snake now!

Collect passengers in London, São Paulo, Cairo, and more without crossing your own path.

google-santa-tracker.title: Google Santa Tracker
google-santa-tracker.description:
About Google Santa Tracker

Google Santa Tracker opens its doors each December with a new mini-game or interactive activity every day leading up to Christmas. The collection includes coding challenges, geography games, creative tools, and festive arcade games — all wrapped in a charming holiday village. Play for free now!

Google Santa Tracker Gameplay

The tracker presents a holiday village hub where each building represents a different mini-game or activity. Activities range from educational (coding with elves, geography quizzes about Santa's route) to creative (card making, music mixing) to pure arcade fun (snowball fights, present delivery runs). New games unlock daily during the December countdown.

On Christmas Eve, the tracker switches to a live map showing Santa's journey around the world in real time, with factoids about each country he visits. The combination of games, education, and holiday magic has made Google Santa Tracker an annual tradition for millions of families. The mini-games are polished enough to stand on their own, and the festive wrapping makes them feel special.

How to Play Google Santa Tracker

Click on buildings in the village to launch different mini-games and activities. Each game has its own controls explained at the start. Explore every building to find all available games. Check back daily for newly unlocked activities during December. On Christmas Eve, follow Santa's journey on the live tracker map.

Game Features

  • Dozens of festive mini-games and activities
  • Daily unlocks during the December countdown
  • Educational games including coding and geography
  • Creative tools for cards and music
  • Live Santa tracking on Christmas Eve

Join the holiday fun and explore everything the village has to offer. Play Google Santa Tracker now!

The annual tradition of unlocking new activities each December day creates genuine excitement and anticipation for families around the world. Each mini-game is polished enough to stand on its own, and the festive wrapping ties everything together into a magical holiday experience that children and adults alike look forward to every year.

Wrap presents, sort candy, code elves, and more across a full December advent calendar.

growmi.title: Growmi
growmi.description:
About Growmi

Growmi is a puzzle game built around one beautiful mechanic: your snake-like creature can extend its body to fill empty spaces and retract to squeeze through tight gaps. Navigate maze-like levels by strategically growing and shrinking to reach the exit. Play for free now!

Growmi Gameplay

Each level is a grid-based puzzle where your Growmi creature must reach the exit door. Moving forward extends your body, making you longer. You can retract by pressing undo or shrink to reduce your length. The key insight is that your body acts as a bridge — extend across a gap, then walk over your own body to reach otherwise inaccessible areas.

The puzzles start simple but quickly become deviously complex. Later levels introduce buttons that open doors, movable blocks, teleporters, and colour-coded zones that only specific body segments can pass through. Each puzzle has an elegant solution that usually requires thinking several moves ahead and using your body in creative ways. The satisfaction of solving a stumper is immense.

How to Play Growmi

Use the arrow keys or WASD to move Growmi. Moving forward extends your body. Press Z or click the undo button to retract the last move. Press R to restart the current level. Press the shrink button to reduce your body length. Press M to open the level map. Press Escape for the pause menu. Think carefully — your body length is both your greatest tool and your biggest obstacle.

Game Features

  • Unique grow-and-shrink puzzle mechanic
  • Dozens of hand-crafted puzzle levels
  • Undo system for experimenting without penalty
  • Progressive difficulty with new mechanics per world
  • Elegant puzzle design with satisfying solutions

Stretch your brain and your body to solve every puzzle. Play Growmi now!
intro: A snake-creature trapped in a dungeon must stretch to fill every tile — then find the exit.
Each room adds new obstacles that demand careful route planning and creative thinking.

halloween.title: Google Halloween
halloween.description:
About Google Halloween (Magic Cat Academy)

Magic Cat Academy is one of the most acclaimed Google Doodles ever created. Momo the wizard cat stands at the centre of her school, casting spells against waves of ghosts by tracing symbols with the mouse. Released for Halloween 2016, it set a new standard for interactive Doodles. Play for free now!

Magic Cat Academy Gameplay

Ghosts float toward Momo from all sides of the screen, each displaying a symbol above its head — lines, angles, zigzags, and loops. Draw the matching symbol with your mouse or finger to cast a spell that banishes the ghost in a burst of magical sparkles. Speed and accuracy are equally important, as multiple ghosts approach simultaneously.

The game spans five levels, each set in a different room of the Academy with unique ghost types and increasingly complex symbols. The library ghosts require multi-stroke symbols, the gymnasium introduces fast-moving targets, and the boss fight demands a rapid sequence of precise drawings. Combo chains — banishing multiple ghosts without pausing — trigger screen-clearing explosions and massive score bonuses. The pixel-art style and Halloween soundtrack are pitch-perfect.

How to Play Magic Cat Academy

Click and drag the mouse or swipe on mobile to trace the symbol shown above each ghost. Draw accurately and quickly — sloppy traces will not register as valid spells. Target the closest ghosts first. Chain banishments together without stopping for combo multipliers. Each level ends with a boss ghost that requires more complex spell patterns.

Game Features

  • Five themed levels through the Magic Cat Academy
  • Symbol-drawing spell mechanic — intuitive and satisfying
  • Combo system for score multipliers
  • Unique boss fights at the end of each level
  • Beautiful pixel art and atmospheric Halloween soundtrack

Defend the Academy and prove Momo is the greatest wizard cat. Play Google Halloween now!
intro: Magic Cat Momo faces five ghost bosses — draw their symbols fast to defeat them.
Google's beloved Halloween 2016 Doodle, as replayable today as the day it launched.

handless-millionaire.title: Handless-Millionaire
handless-millionaire.description:
About Handless Millionaire

Handless Millionaire is a darkly humorous reaction-time game that turns the classic game-show format into a test of nerve and timing. Reach into a guillotine to grab falling banknotes — but pull back before the blade drops or lose a hand. The stakes (literally) get higher with every round. Play for free now!

Handless Millionaire Gameplay

Bundles of cash dangle above a razor-sharp guillotine. Press and hold to reach in, and release before the blade falls. Grab the money and keep your hand; hesitate too long and... well, the title says it all. Each successful grab earns money that counts toward your total fortune.

The timing window shrinks with each round. Early grabs give you generous reaction time, but by the later rounds the blade drops almost instantly after the money appears. The game also varies the delay unpredictably — sometimes the blade waits, sometimes it falls immediately, keeping you perpetually on edge. The cartoon gore is played for laughs, with exaggerated reactions and absurd physics that keep the tone light despite the premise.

How to Play Handless Millionaire

Press and hold the spacebar, mouse button, or tap and hold on mobile to reach your hand into the guillotine. Release to pull back. Grab the money bundle before the blade falls. Time your grab carefully — reaching too slowly means the blade catches you. Lose both hands and the game is over. Survive as many rounds as possible to build your fortune.

Game Features

  • Nerve-testing reaction-time gameplay
  • Shrinking timing windows for escalating tension
  • Unpredictable blade delays that keep you guessing
  • Cartoon art style that keeps the dark humour light
  • Cumulative money counter tracking your fortune

How rich can you get with both hands intact? Play Handless Millionaire now!
intro: A guillotine blade swings back and forth — the cash is on the other side.
Time your grab perfectly. The blade does not negotiate.

Move your hand
Grab the cash

hangman-challenge.title: Hangman Challenge
hangman-challenge.description:
About Hangman Challenge

Hangman Challenge brings the classic pencil-and-paper word game to your browser with polished visuals, multiple word categories, and adaptive difficulty. Guess the hidden word one letter at a time before the stick figure is fully drawn. It is simple, educational, and endlessly replayable. Play for free now!

Hangman Challenge Gameplay

A hidden word is represented by a row of blank dashes. Select letters from an on-screen keyboard — correct letters fill in their positions in the word, while incorrect guesses add body parts to the hangman figure. You have a limited number of wrong guesses before the drawing is complete and the game ends.

The game draws words from multiple categories — animals, countries, food, technology, sports, and more. Some categories offer longer, more obscure words for experienced players, while simpler categories are perfect for younger players or English learners. The adaptive hint system provides a clue after several wrong guesses, keeping frustration low while maintaining challenge. Letter frequency strategy matters — start with common vowels and consonants to reveal the word's shape before making targeted guesses.

How to Play Hangman Challenge

Click on letters in the on-screen alphabet to guess them. Correct letters appear in their positions within the hidden word. Incorrect letters are crossed out and a body part is added to the hangman figure. Use the category as a clue to narrow down possibilities. You can request a hint after multiple wrong guesses. Solve the word before the figure is complete to win.

Game Features

  • Classic hangman gameplay with polished presentation
  • Multiple word categories for variety
  • Adaptive hint system to reduce frustration
  • Educational vocabulary building for all ages
  • Clean, responsive interface on desktop and mobile

Test your vocabulary and deduction skills. Play Hangman Challenge now!
intro: Guess the hidden word letter by letter before the gallows drawing is complete.
Think about letter frequency, start smart, and don't let the scaffold fill up.

happy-snakes.title: Happy Snakes
happy-snakes.description:
About Happy Snakes

Happy Snakes is a cheerful, multiplayer-inspired take on the classic Snake game. Guide your colourful snake around the arena, eating food to grow longer while avoiding collisions with other snakes. The longer you survive and the bigger you grow, the higher you climb on the leaderboard. Play for free now!

Happy Snakes Gameplay

Your snake slithers continuously around a large open arena filled with glowing food orbs. Eating orbs makes you longer and earns points. Other snakes — controlled by AI — roam the same arena, and if your head touches any part of another snake's body, you are eliminated. However, if another snake runs into your body, they are eliminated and leave behind a trail of high-value food.

The strategic depth comes from using your own body as a weapon. Coil around smaller snakes to trap them, cut off escape routes, and force opponents into collisions. The arena also spawns power-ups — speed boosts, shields, and magnets that pull nearby food toward you. Growing longer is both an advantage (more body to use as a barrier) and a risk (harder to manoeuvre without hitting yourself).

How to Play Happy Snakes

Use the arrow keys, WASD, or mouse to steer your snake. Move toward food orbs to eat them and grow. Avoid head-on collisions with other snakes. Use speed boosts strategically to cut off opponents. When an opponent is eliminated, rush to eat their remains for rapid growth. Survive as long as possible and grow as large as you can.

Game Features

  • Classic Snake gameplay in a multiplayer-style arena
  • AI opponents with varying strategies
  • Power-ups including speed boosts, shields, and magnets
  • Strategic coiling and trapping mechanics
  • Leaderboard tracking your best runs

Grow the longest snake in the arena and dominate the leaderboard. Play Happy Snakes now!
intro: Every snake on the planet wants to be the biggest — including yours.
Eat glowing orbs, outmanoeuvre rivals, and cut off their escape routes to feast on their remains.

iron-snout-pig-fighting-game.title: Iron Snout - Pig Fighting Game
iron-snout-pig-fighting-game.description:
About Iron Snout

Iron Snout is a surprisingly deep beat-em-up starring a tough little pig who refuses to be the wolf's dinner. Standing in the centre of the screen, punch, kick, and counter-attack endless waves of wolves using nothing but your hooves and quick reflexes. Play for free now!

Iron Snout Gameplay

Wolves attack from both sides in increasing numbers and variety. Basic wolves charge straight at you; ninja wolves leap from above; chainsaw wolves rush with deadly weapons; and rocket wolves fly in from off-screen. Your pig fights back with directional attacks — punches left, kicks right, uppercuts, and ground slams — each mapped to simple directional controls.

The combo system rewards aggressive play. Chain attacks together without getting hit to build multipliers that send wolves flying in spectacular fashion. Catch thrown weapons mid-air and hurl them back for devastating counter-attacks. The wolf variety keeps combat fresh — each type requires different timing and strategy. The pig's animations are absurdly satisfying, from spinning heel kicks to gravity-defying uppercuts that launch wolves into orbit.

How to Play Iron Snout

Press the left arrow to punch left, right arrow to kick right, up arrow to uppercut or jump, down arrow to duck or ground slam. On mobile, swipe in the corresponding direction. Catch thrown objects by pressing in their direction at the right moment. Chain attacks together for combo multipliers. Survive as many waves as possible without getting hit.

Game Features

  • Fast-paced beat-em-up combat with simple directional controls
  • Multiple wolf enemy types with unique attack patterns
  • Satisfying combo system with flashy animations
  • Weapon-catching counter-attack mechanic
  • Endlessly escalating difficulty

Show those wolves that this pig fights back. Play Iron Snout now!
intro: One pig. Infinite wolves. Iron Snout is a one-button brawler of magnificent intensity.
Kick, punch, backflip, and grab weapons from your enemies' hands before they overwhelm you.

Fight off the wolves or

jerry-lawson.title: Jerry Lawson Game
jerry-lawson.description:
About Jerry Lawson Doodle

Jerry Lawson was a pioneering engineer who led the development of the first cartridge-based video game console — the Fairchild Channel F — in 1976. His innovation of interchangeable game cartridges transformed the industry. This Google Doodle celebrates his legacy with an interactive game-making experience. Play for free now!

Jerry Lawson Doodle Gameplay

The Doodle lets you both play and create simple platformer games. Five pre-made levels teach you the basics — running, jumping, collecting items, and reaching the goal. After playing them, you unlock the level editor, where you can place platforms, obstacles, collectibles, and decorations to build your own levels and share them.

The level editor is surprisingly powerful for a Doodle. Choose from multiple tile types, set the player's start position, place the goal, and add enemies with different movement patterns. The intuitive drag-and-drop interface makes level creation accessible even for young players. Between levels, educational panels tell the story of Lawson's career — from his childhood tinkering with electronics to his groundbreaking work at Fairchild Semiconductor.

How to Play Jerry Lawson Doodle

Use the arrow keys to move and jump in the platformer levels. Collect all items and reach the goal to complete each level. After playing the five tutorial levels, click the editor button to open the level creator. Drag and drop tiles to build your level. Click play to test it. Share your creation with the share button. Switch between play and edit mode freely.

Game Features

  • Five pre-made platformer levels to play
  • Full level editor with drag-and-drop interface
  • Multiple tile types including platforms, enemies, and items
  • Educational content about Jerry Lawson's legacy
  • Share your created levels with friends

Play, create, and honour a video game pioneer. Play the Jerry Lawson Doodle now!
intro: Honour Jerry Lawson, inventor of the removable game cartridge, by building your own game.
Step into his 1970s workshop and code a simple game for his pioneering Fairchild Channel F.

longcat.title: Longcat
longcat.description:
About Longcat Journey

Longcat Journey is a quirky platformer starring the internet's most famously elongated feline. Guide your endlessly stretching cat through obstacle courses, using its ever-growing body as a bridge, a ladder, and a shield. The longer the cat gets, the more creative the solutions become. Play for free now!

Longcat Gameplay

Your cat stretches as it moves, growing longer with every step. This growing body is the core mechanic — extend across gaps to create bridges for yourself, climb vertically by bracing against walls, and coil around obstacles to squeeze through tight spaces. Each level is a spatial puzzle disguised as a platformer.

The levels start with simple gap-bridging challenges and gradually introduce moving platforms, switches that must be held down by your body weight, and timing puzzles where you must stretch across hazards at precisely the right moment. The cat's expressions — ranging from determined to deeply confused — add personality to every stretch. Collectible fish hidden in tricky locations reward explorers with bonus levels.

How to Play Longcat Journey

Use the arrow keys or WASD to move the cat. The cat's body stretches automatically as you move. Press Space to anchor a section of your body in place. Use your anchored body as a bridge to cross gaps. Press R to retract and shorten your body. Collect fish for bonus points and to unlock extra levels.

Game Features

  • Unique stretching mechanic — your body is your primary tool
  • Puzzle-platformer levels requiring creative solutions
  • Charming cat character with expressive animations
  • Hidden collectible fish in challenging locations
  • Progressively complex level design

Stretch, bridge, and coil your way through every level. Play Longcat Journey now!
intro: Stretch a rubbery cat through winding mazes by elongating its body to fill every corridor.
Navigate tight corners and trigger platforms — but don't get stuck.

magic-cat-academy.title: Magic Cat Academy
magic-cat-academy.description:
About Magic Cat Academy 2

Magic Cat Academy 2 is the sequel to the smash-hit 2016 Google Doodle. Momo the wizard cat dives beneath the waves to defend the underwater world from ghostly invaders. Draw symbols to cast spells against aquatic ghosts in a vibrant undersea setting with new mechanics and bigger boss battles. Play for free now!

Magic Cat Academy 2 Gameplay

Ghost sea creatures approach Momo from all directions — spectral jellyfish, phantom octopi, ghostly anglerfish, and more. Each enemy displays a symbol that you must trace accurately to cast a banishing spell. The underwater theme introduces new symbol shapes and enemy behaviours not seen in the original, keeping veterans on their toes.

Five undersea levels take Momo deeper into the ocean — coral reefs, kelp forests, deep trenches, volcanic vents, and the final boss's lair. Each environment introduces new ghost types with unique movement patterns and increasingly complex symbols. The boss fights are bigger and more dramatic than the original, requiring rapid multi-stroke spell sequences. The vibrant underwater art, fluid animations, and atmospheric soundtrack create a magical experience.

How to Play Magic Cat Academy 2

Click and drag the mouse or swipe on mobile to trace the symbol shown above each ghost enemy. Accurate traces banish the ghost; sloppy traces fail. Target the nearest ghosts first to prevent them from reaching Momo. Chain successful banishments without pausing for combo score multipliers. Boss fights require rapid consecutive symbol traces.

Game Features

  • Five underwater levels with unique themes
  • New ghost enemy types with aquatic designs
  • More complex symbols than the original
  • Epic underwater boss battles
  • Beautiful ocean art and atmospheric soundtrack

Dive deep and defend the ocean from ghostly invaders. Play Magic Cat Academy 2 now!
intro: Draw symbols to defeat a ghost army and defend the Magic Cat Academy.
Google's beloved Halloween 2016 Doodle — five stages, five bosses, one brilliant wizard cat.

marble-race-creator.title: Marble Race Creator
marble-race-creator.description:
About Marble Race Creator

Marble Race Creator hands you the tools to design your own marble racing courses and watch your colourful marbles zoom, bounce, and tumble through the chaos. Build tracks with ramps, loops, funnels, and obstacles, then release the marbles and see which one survives the course to cross the finish line first. Play for free now!

Marble Race Creator Gameplay

The editor provides a library of track pieces — straight sections, curves, ramps, loops, half-pipes, funnels, bumpers, and jump pads. Snap pieces together to create a continuous course from start to finish. Add obstacles like spinning blades, moving walls, and narrowing channels to create drama and eliminate marbles. Place the finish line and release up to a dozen colour-coded marbles to race.

The physics engine makes every race unpredictable. Identical courses produce different results each time because tiny variations in marble positioning at the start cascade into wildly different outcomes. This unpredictability is the magic — no matter how many times you run the same course, the winner is never certain. Watching marbles narrowly avoid obstacles, get launched off ramps, and squeeze through tight gaps is endlessly entertaining.

How to Play Marble Race Creator

Click on track pieces in the sidebar to select them, then click on the canvas to place them. Drag to reposition pieces. Use the rotate button to change piece orientation. Connect pieces to form a complete course. Set the number of racing marbles. Press the play button to release the marbles and watch the race unfold.

Game Features

  • Full track editor with dozens of piece types
  • Realistic marble physics with unpredictable results
  • Up to twelve colour-coded racing marbles
  • Obstacles including spinning blades and moving walls
  • Replay and share your best course designs

Design the ultimate marble course and watch the chaos unfold. Play Marble Race Creator now!
intro: Build your own marble run from scratch, then watch physics do the rest.
Design ramps, funnels, and bumpers — optimise the course and beat your own time.
marble-race-creator.controls: Build the marble run track

memory.title: Google Memory Game
memory.description:
About Memory Game

Memory is the classic card-matching game that tests your recall and concentration. Flip over cards two at a time, trying to find matching pairs. Remember where each card is hidden, clear the entire board, and challenge yourself to do it in fewer moves each time. Play for free now!

Memory Gameplay

A grid of face-down cards is presented at the start of each round. Click on two cards to flip them over — if they match, they remain face up and you score a point. If they do not match, they flip back over and you must remember their positions for future turns. Clear all pairs to win the round.

The game offers multiple grid sizes for different difficulty levels. A 4×4 grid with 8 pairs is a gentle warm-up, while a 6×6 grid with 18 pairs demands serious concentration. Themed card sets — animals, flags, food, emojis — keep the visuals fresh across replays. The move counter and timer create benchmarks to beat, turning a relaxing memory exercise into a competitive challenge against your own best performance.

How to Play Memory

Click or tap on a card to flip it over. Click or tap on a second card to reveal it. If the two cards match, they stay face up. If they do not match, both cards flip back over after a brief pause. Remember the positions of revealed cards. Continue flipping pairs until all matches are found. Try to clear the board in as few moves as possible.

Game Features

  • Classic card-matching gameplay
  • Multiple grid sizes for adjustable difficulty
  • Themed card sets for visual variety
  • Move counter and timer for competitive play
  • Clean, responsive design on all devices

Test your memory and clear the board in record time. Play Memory now!
intro: Flip cards, find matching pairs, and clear the board — Google's classic memory trainer.
The later rounds are genuinely ruthless. Your brain will get the workout it deserves.
memory.controls: Flip a card or

minesweeper.title: Google Minesweeper
minesweeper.description:
About Minesweeper

Minesweeper is the legendary logic puzzle that has been preinstalled on computers since 1990. Click tiles to reveal numbers indicating how many adjacent mines are hidden. Use pure deduction to identify every safe tile without clicking a mine. One wrong click and it is game over. Play for free now!

Minesweeper Gameplay

The board is a grid of hidden tiles, some containing mines. Clicking a tile reveals either a number (indicating how many of its eight neighbouring tiles contain mines) or a mine (game over). Using the number clues, deduce which tiles are safe and which are mined. Flag tiles you believe contain mines to keep track of your deductions.

The beauty of Minesweeper lies in its logical patterns. A 1 next to a single unrevealed tile means that tile is definitely a mine. A 2 adjacent to two unrevealed tiles means both are mines. As you clear more tiles, the clues interact in increasingly complex ways, creating chains of deduction that feel deeply satisfying to unravel. Three difficulty levels — easy (9×9, 10 mines), medium (16×16, 40 mines), and hard (30×16, 99 mines) — offer progressively greater challenges.

How to Play Minesweeper

Left-click on a tile to reveal it. If it shows a number, that number tells you how many of the eight surrounding tiles contain mines. Right-click or long-press on a tile to flag it as a mine. Use the number clues to deduce which tiles are safe. Clear all non-mine tiles to win. The first click is always safe.

Game Features

  • Classic Minesweeper logic gameplay
  • Three difficulty levels — easy, medium, and hard
  • Flag system for tracking suspected mines
  • Timer and mine counter for competitive play
  • Guaranteed safe first click

Use logic and deduction to clear the board without triggering a mine. Play Minesweeper now!
intro: Clear the minefield using logic, deduction, and a steady nerve.
Numbers tell you everything you need to know — use them to find every mine without triggering one.
minesweeper.controls:
Reveal a square
Place a flag

mothers-day-2013-doodle.title: Mother's Day 2013 Doodle
mothers-day-2013-doodle.description:
About Mother's Day 2013 Doodle

Google's Mother's Day 2013 Doodle is a heartwarming interactive card-maker that lets you create a personalised digital bouquet for your mum. Choose flowers, arrange them, and add a personal message to create a unique card you can share. Play for free now!

Mother's Day 2013 Doodle Gameplay

The interactive experience walks you through three stages of card creation. First, select from a variety of flower types — roses, tulips, daisies, sunflowers, and more — each available in multiple colours. Drag and drop them into a vase to build your arrangement. Second, add decorative elements like ribbons, bows, and wrapping paper. Third, write a personal message to accompany your bouquet.

The flower arrangement is surprisingly creative. Stack flowers in any order, mix colours freely, and experiment with different combinations to create something that feels personal. The interface is designed to be accessible to young children making their first Mother's Day card, while offering enough variety for adults to create genuinely lovely arrangements. Once complete, the card can be shared via email or social media.

How to Play Mother's Day 2013 Doodle

Click on flowers to select them and drag them into the vase. Mix and match different types and colours. Click the colour palette to change flower colours. Add decorative elements from the decoration panel. Click the text field to type your personal message. Press the share button to send your creation to your mum via email or social media.

Game Features

  • Interactive bouquet builder with multiple flower types
  • Colour customisation for every flower
  • Decorative elements including ribbons and wrapping
  • Personal message field for heartfelt notes
  • Share via email and social media

Create a beautiful digital bouquet and brighten your mum's day. Play the Mother's Day 2013 Doodle now!
intro: Design a personalised Mother's Day card using stencils, paint, and decorations.
Pick your colours, stamp your message, and create something beautiful for someone special.
mothers-day-2013-doodle.controls: Choose your options or

mothers-day-2020-doodle.title: Mother's Day 2020 Doodle
mothers-day-2020-doodle.description:
About Mother's Day 2020 Doodle

Released during lockdown, the Mother's Day 2020 Doodle is an interactive crafting game that lets you make and send a virtual card to your mum. Paint, draw, add stickers, and write messages on a digital card that can be shared directly from the Doodle. Play for free now!

Mother's Day 2020 Doodle Gameplay

The Doodle provides a blank card canvas with a full suite of creative tools. Choose from multiple card templates — fold-out cards, postcards, and pop-up designs. Then customise using the drawing tool (multiple brush sizes and colours), sticker library (hearts, flowers, animals, food), text tool (multiple fonts), and background patterns. Every element can be resized, rotated, and repositioned.

The sticker library is extensive and charming, with hand-drawn illustrations that give your card a warm, personal feel. The drawing tools are responsive enough to create genuine artwork on tablets with styluses, while remaining fun and forgiving for finger-painting on phones. The pop-up card template adds an extra dimension — place stickers that spring up when the card opens, creating delightful surprise moments.

How to Play Mother's Day 2020 Doodle

Select a card template to start. Use the brush tool to draw freely on the card. Choose colours from the palette. Add stickers by tapping them and dragging to position. Resize and rotate stickers with pinch gestures. Type messages using the text tool. Switch between card front and inside. Press the share button to send your finished card.

Game Features

  • Multiple card templates including pop-up designs
  • Drawing tools with various brush sizes and colours
  • Extensive sticker library with hand-drawn illustrations
  • Text tool with multiple fonts
  • Direct sharing via email and social media

Craft a heartfelt digital card and send love to your mum. Play the Mother's Day 2020 Doodle now!
intro: Mix and match illustrated elements to build the perfect personalised Mother's Day card.
Choose a scene, add characters, layer decorations, and write your message.

moto-xm-bike-race-game.title: Moto X3M Bike Race Game
moto-xm-bike-race-game.description:
About Moto XM Bike Race

Moto XM Bike Race is a physics-based motocross game where you ride across treacherous terrain, performing flips and stunts while trying not to crash. Navigate steep hills, deep valleys, and massive jumps on your motorbike, balancing speed with control on every obstacle. Play for free now!

Moto XM Gameplay

Each level is a side-scrolling course filled with extreme terrain — steep inclines, sharp drops, loop-the-loops, and massive gap jumps. Your bike responds to realistic physics: lean too far forward and you face-plant, lean too far back and you flip over, hit a bump at the wrong angle and you cartwheel into the dirt. Finding the balance between speed and control is the core challenge.

Stars scattered throughout each level reward risk-taking — they are placed in locations that require dangerous speed, risky jumps, or precise balance to reach. Collecting all three stars in a level unlocks bonus content. The bike upgrade system lets you improve acceleration, top speed, and suspension between levels, making previously impossible sections achievable with better equipment.

How to Play Moto XM

Press the up arrow or W to accelerate. Press the down arrow or S to brake and reverse. Use left and right arrows or A and D to lean the rider backward and forward. Balance your lean angle on slopes and during jumps. Reach the finish flag to complete the level. Collect stars for bonus rewards. Avoid crashing by managing your speed and lean angle carefully.

Game Features

  • Physics-based motocross with realistic bike handling
  • Dozens of challenging courses with extreme terrain
  • Star collection system for completionists
  • Bike upgrade system for progressive improvement
  • Stunt scoring for flips and tricks

Master the physics and conquer every course. Play Moto XM Bike Race now!
intro: Fly over jumps, loop through rotating saws, and brake hard before impossible drops.
Every crash is spectacular; every clean run is deeply satisfying. Beat par time to progress.

Ride the bike or

mr-racer.title: Mr Racer
mr-racer.description:
About Mr Racer

Mr Racer is a high-speed endless highway racing game where you weave through traffic at breakneck speeds. Dodge cars, trucks, and buses while collecting coins and power-ups on a highway that never ends. The further you drive, the faster the traffic moves. Play for free now!

Mr Racer Gameplay

Your car speeds along a multi-lane highway filled with civilian traffic. Swerve between vehicles, squeeze through narrow gaps, and use the shoulder to bypass congestion. Near-miss passes — threading between two vehicles with centimetres to spare — earn bonus points and fill your turbo meter for brief bursts of even greater speed.

Traffic density and speed increase the further you drive, creating escalating tension as gaps shrink and reaction times compress. Different vehicle types move at different speeds — trucks are slow but wide, sports cars are fast and unpredictable, buses change lanes without warning. Power-ups appear randomly: shields protect you from one collision, magnets pull in nearby coins, and slow-motion briefly freezes traffic so you can navigate impossible-looking gaps.

How to Play Mr Racer

Use the left and right arrow keys or A and D to change lanes. Press the up arrow or W to accelerate. Press the down arrow or S to brake. Activate turbo with the spacebar when the meter is full. Collect coins to increase your score. Grab power-ups for temporary advantages. Avoid collisions with other vehicles — one crash ends the run.

Game Features

  • High-speed endless highway racing
  • Dense, varied traffic patterns
  • Near-miss bonus system rewarding risky driving
  • Turbo meter for speed boosts
  • Power-ups including shields, magnets, and slow-motion

Push your reflexes to the limit on the endless highway. Play Mr Racer now!
intro: Weave through endless traffic, collect coins, and upgrade your car in this relentless racer.
One wrong swerve sends you back to the start — stay sharp and keep accelerating.

no-internet-dinosaur-game-google-chrome-.title: Chrome Dino Game
no-internet-dinosaur-game-google-chrome-.description:
About Chrome Dino Runner

The Chrome Dino Runner — also known as the T-Rex Game — is Google Chrome's hidden gem that appears when your internet connection drops. The pixelated T-Rex runs endlessly across a desert landscape, jumping over cacti and ducking under pterodactyls. Simple, addictive, and beloved by millions worldwide. Play for free now!

Chrome Dino Gameplay

The T-Rex runs automatically at an ever-increasing speed across a flat desert. Single cacti, clustered cacti, and tall cacti appear as ground obstacles that require well-timed jumps. Pterodactyls fly at head height, requiring you to duck underneath them. As the game progresses, the speed increases and obstacles appear with less spacing, demanding faster reflexes.

At the 700-point mark, the game shifts from day to night — the screen inverts to a dark background with light-coloured sprites. This disorienting transition has ended countless runs for unprepared players. The game continues alternating between day and night as the score climbs into the thousands. The theoretical maximum score is 99999, at which point the game resets. Power-ups do not exist — it is pure reflexes, timing, and endurance from start to finish.

How to Play Chrome Dino

Press Space or the up arrow to jump over cacti and ground obstacles. Press the down arrow to duck under flying pterodactyls. The longer you hold the jump button, the higher the T-Rex leaps. Time your jumps based on the obstacle height — small hops for single cacti, bigger jumps for clusters. Duck quickly when pterodactyls approach at head height.

Game Features

  • Iconic minimalist pixel art style
  • Endlessly escalating speed for increasing challenge
  • Day-night cycle that inverts the screen
  • Two obstacle types — cacti (jump) and pterodactyls (duck)
  • Score tracking up to the legendary 99999

Run, jump, and duck your way to a legendary high score. Play Chrome Dino now!
intro: The original offline Chrome dino — jump cacti, duck pterodactyls, and run forever.
The score caps at 99,999 — a milestone very few players have ever reached.
no-internet-dinosaur-game-google-chrome-.controls:
Jump or
Duck

odd-bot-out.title: Odd Bot Out
odd-bot-out.description:
About Odd Bot Out

Odd Bot Out is a heartfelt puzzle platformer about a defective robot escaping a recycling factory. Every level is a physics puzzle where you build structures, activate machines, and manipulate the environment to guide your little bot to freedom. The puzzles are clever, the story is touching, and the solutions are always satisfying. Play for free now!

Odd Bot Out Gameplay

Each level presents a contained environment with the exit marked clearly. Your bot can walk, climb short ledges, and pick up objects, but it cannot jump high or break through walls. Instead, you must use the available materials — planks, springs, magnets, gears, and other mechanical components — to build paths and machines that carry the bot to the exit.

The physics engine makes construction feel tactile and real. Stack planks to build ramps, attach springs to launch the bot over walls, use magnets to float across gaps, and connect gears to power conveyor belts. Some levels require Rube Goldberg-style chain reactions where one action triggers another in a satisfying cascade. The factory aesthetic grows more oppressive as you escape, making each solved puzzle feel like a genuine triumph.

How to Play Odd Bot Out

Tap or click where you want the bot to walk. Tap on objects to interact with them — pick up items, press buttons, activate switches. Drag items to move and position them. Drop items on surfaces to place them. Stack and combine materials to build structures. Guide the bot to the exit door to complete each level.

Game Features

  • Physics-based puzzle construction in every level
  • Charming defective robot protagonist
  • Creative building with planks, springs, magnets, and gears
  • Rube Goldberg-style chain-reaction puzzles
  • Touching escape-from-the-factory storyline

Build your way to freedom and prove that being different is your greatest strength. Play Odd Bot Out now!
intro: A tiny robot deemed too small for the factory needs your help to escape.
Flip switches, ride platforms, and reprogram other robots to carve a path to the exit.
