Move the robot or or
Undo an action
Restart the puzzle

ooze-odyssey-2.title: Ooze Odyssey 2
ooze-odyssey-2.description:
About Ooze Odyssey 2

Ooze Odyssey 2 follows a blob of living slime on an adventure through colourful, hazard-filled worlds. Your ooze can stretch, squish, stick to surfaces, and absorb smaller blobs to grow bigger. Navigate obstacle courses by morphing your body to fit through gaps, bridge chasms, and bounce off walls. Play for free now!

Ooze Odyssey 2 Gameplay

Your ooze character has unique physics — it deforms when it hits surfaces, stretches when pulled between anchor points, and bounces with a satisfying wobble. These properties are the basis for every puzzle. Stretch between two walls to bridge a gap, squish flat to slide under barriers, and build momentum by bouncing off springy surfaces to reach high platforms.

Each world introduces new mechanics. Sticky surfaces let you cling to ceilings and walls. Hot surfaces cause your ooze to evaporate (shrink), while cold surfaces freeze you solid temporarily. Absorbing smaller ooze blobs increases your size, granting access to areas that require a larger body. Some puzzles require strategic sizing — too big to fit through a tunnel but too small to reach a ledge, forcing you to manage your mass carefully.

How to Play Ooze Odyssey 2

Use the arrow keys or WASD to move and direct the ooze. Press Space to jump. Hold the jump button for a higher bounce. Press the down arrow to squish flat for low passages. Absorb smaller blobs by moving over them. Navigate through each level to reach the exit portal. Collect gems for bonus points.

Game Features

  • Unique ooze physics with stretching, bouncing, and squishing
  • Size management — absorb blobs or evaporate on hot surfaces
  • Multiple themed worlds with unique mechanics
  • Sticky, hot, and cold surface interactions
  • Collectible gems and hidden paths

Stretch, squish, and bounce your way to the goal. Play Ooze Odyssey 2 now!
intro: A sentient ooze with an enormous appetite slithers through puzzle chambers, devouring everything.
Eat blocks in the right order to grow long enough to reach the exit.

pacman.title: Google Pacman
pacman.description:
About Pac-Man

Pac-Man, the legendary arcade game created by Toru Iwatani in 1980, is one of the most recognisable video games in history. Navigate a maze, eat every dot, avoid four coloured ghosts, and grab power pellets to turn the tables on your pursuers. This faithful recreation brings the full arcade experience to your browser. Play for free now!

Pac-Man Gameplay

The maze is filled with small dots and four large power pellets in the corners. Eat every dot to complete the level. Four ghosts — Blinky (red), Pinky (pink), Inky (cyan), and Clyde (orange) — patrol the maze with distinct AI behaviours. Blinky chases you directly, Pinky tries to ambush from ahead, Inky uses Blinky's position to calculate an intercept point, and Clyde alternates between chasing and retreating.

Eating a power pellet turns the ghosts blue for several seconds, during which you can eat them for escalating bonus points (200, 400, 800, 1600). Fruit bonuses appear in the centre of the maze periodically, offering extra points. The ghosts speed up and the power pellet duration shrinks with each cleared level, pushing skilled players to their limits. The warp tunnels on each side of the maze provide crucial escape routes when ghosts close in.

How to Play Pac-Man

Use the arrow keys to move Pac-Man through the maze. Navigate to eat every dot while avoiding the four ghosts. Eat the large power pellets in the corners to make the ghosts vulnerable (they turn blue). Chase and eat blue ghosts for bonus points. Grab the fruit that appears in the centre for extra score. Use the side tunnels to teleport across the maze.

Game Features

  • Faithful recreation of the 1980 arcade classic
  • Four ghosts with unique AI personalities
  • Power pellet mechanic for turning the tables
  • Escalating difficulty across multiple levels
  • Classic sounds and pixel-perfect visuals

Eat every dot, dodge every ghost, and chase the high score. Play Pac-Man now!
intro: The full Pac-Man maze built directly into the Google logo — the Doodle that broke the internet.
Gobble dots, eat power pellets, and outsmart Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde.
pacman.controls: Steer Pac-Man

penguin-fight.title: Penguin Fight
penguin-fight.description:
About Penguin Fight

Penguin Fight is a hilarious physics-based combat game where two penguins battle on a slippery ice platform. Swing your baseball bat, time your hits, and launch your opponent off the edge to claim victory. The wobbly penguin physics and dramatic knockbacks make every round unpredictably entertaining. Play for free now!

Penguin Fight Gameplay

Two penguins face off on a floating ice platform. Each penguin wields a weapon — typically a baseball bat — and can swing in either direction. The hit physics are exaggerated and chaotic: a well-timed swing sends your opponent sliding across the ice, teetering on the edge, and sometimes flying off entirely. The ice surface makes movement slippery, adding an extra layer of comedy and unpredictability.

Timing is everything. Swing too early and you miss; swing too late and you get hit first. The knockback distance depends on the swing timing and the opponent's position — hitting someone near the edge requires less force. The penguins' wobbly animations, combined with the slippery ice physics, create moments of genuine slapstick comedy as both players struggle to stay on the platform while trying to knock each other off.

How to Play Penguin Fight

Player 1 uses W to jump and E to swing. Player 2 uses the up arrow to jump and the right-shift key to swing. Move toward your opponent and time your swing to connect. Knock your opponent off the ice platform to score a point. Best of five rounds wins the match. The penguin that falls off loses the round. On mobile, use the on-screen buttons.

Game Features

  • Two-player local multiplayer penguin combat
  • Exaggerated physics and hilarious knockbacks
  • Slippery ice platform for chaotic movement
  • Simple controls — jump and swing
  • Best-of-five match format

Grab a friend and settle it on the ice. Play Penguin Fight now!
intro: Snowmen have invaded the penguin's icy home — hold the line with precisely aimed snowballs.
Each wave is stronger than the last; power-ups help, but your aim carries you through.
penguin-fight.controls: Aim and fire

pixel-art-color-by-numbers.title: Pixel Art - Color by Numbers
pixel-art-color-by-numbers.description:
About Pixel Art Color by Numbers

Pixel Art Color by Numbers is a relaxing creative experience that combines the satisfaction of colouring books with pixel art aesthetics. Each template is a grid of numbered squares — match the number to the colour and fill in each square to reveal a beautiful pixel illustration. Play for free now!

Pixel Art Gameplay

Select a template from the gallery — animals, food, landscapes, characters, and more. Each square in the grid contains a small number corresponding to a colour in the palette below. Tap a colour, then tap the numbered squares that match to fill them in. As you work through the numbers, the hidden image gradually emerges from the blank grid.

The templates range from simple 16×16 images for beginners to detailed 64×64 masterpieces for experienced pixel artists. The auto-fill feature highlights all squares matching the currently selected colour, helping you work systematically. A zoom function lets you focus on detailed areas without accidentally filling wrong squares. The completed images can be saved, shared, or used as phone wallpapers. The meditative, no-pressure gameplay makes it perfect for unwinding.

How to Play Pixel Art

Select a template from the gallery. Tap a colour from the palette at the bottom of the screen. Tap on the numbered squares in the grid that match your selected colour. Pinch to zoom in on detailed areas. Use the auto-highlight feature to see all matching squares. Complete the entire grid to reveal the finished pixel art. Save or share your completed artwork.

Game Features

  • Large gallery of pixel art templates across categories
  • Numbered colour-matching system for guided creation
  • Auto-highlight feature for systematic colouring
  • Zoom function for detailed work
  • Save and share completed artwork

Relax, colour by numbers, and create beautiful pixel art. Play Pixel Art Color by Numbers now!
intro: Fill numbered cells with the matching colour and reveal hidden pixel art images.
Relax, zone out, and watch something beautiful emerge from a grid of numbers.
pixel-art-color-by-numbers.controls:
Fill a cell with color
Zoom in / out

poker-with-friends.title: Poker With Friends
poker-with-friends.description:
About Poker with Friends

Poker with Friends brings Texas Hold'em to your browser with a clean interface, AI opponents of varying skill, and the strategic depth that has made poker the world's most popular card game. Bet, bluff, and read your opponents to build the biggest chip stack at the table. Play for free now!

Poker with Friends Gameplay

Each hand follows standard Texas Hold'em rules. You receive two hole cards, then community cards are dealt in three stages — the flop (three cards), the turn (one card), and the river (one card). Build the best five-card hand using any combination of your hole cards and the community cards. Betting rounds occur before the flop and after each community card deal.

The AI opponents play with distinct personalities — some are tight and conservative, folding most hands; others are loose and aggressive, raising frequently with marginal cards. Reading their betting patterns is crucial to making profitable decisions. The strategic depth of Texas Hold'em shines here: knowing when to bet for value, when to bluff, and when to fold separates winning players from losing ones. The clean interface shows pot odds and hand rankings to help newer players learn.

How to Play Poker with Friends

Click Check to stay in without betting. Click Call to match the current bet. Click Raise to increase the bet. Click Fold to surrender your hand. Use the slider to set your raise amount. Evaluate your hole cards and the community cards to decide your action. Watch opponent betting patterns for tells. The best five-card combination wins the pot at showdown.

Game Features

  • Standard Texas Hold'em rules and gameplay
  • AI opponents with distinct playing styles
  • Clean interface with pot odds display
  • Hand ranking reference for new players
  • Multiple table sizes and buy-in levels

Read the table, make the call, and stack the chips. Play Poker with Friends now!
intro: Play Texas Hold'em poker with friends or strangers — no download, no account required.
Develop your bluff, read the table, and build the biggest stack.

pony-express.title: Pony Express
pony-express.description:
About Pony Express

Google's Pony Express Doodle celebrates the legendary mail delivery service that operated from 1860 to 1861. Ride your horse across the American frontier, collecting letters while dodging rocks, cacti, fences, and other obstacles on a wild gallop through the Old West. Play for free now!

Pony Express Gameplay

Your rider gallops automatically across a side-scrolling frontier landscape. Letters are scattered along the route — ride through them to collect them and earn points. Obstacles appear on the trail: low fences require jumping, overhead branches require ducking, and rocks on the path must be avoided by switching lanes.

The route spans multiple stages representing different regions of the frontier — prairies, deserts, mountains, and river crossings. Each region has unique obstacles and environmental hazards. Desert stages feature tumbleweeds and rattlesnakes; mountain stages have falling boulders and narrow cliff paths. The pace increases with each stage, demanding faster reactions. Completing all stages with maximum letter collection earns a star rating and unlocks bonus historical facts about the real Pony Express.

How to Play Pony Express

Press the up arrow or Space to jump over low obstacles. Press the down arrow to duck under overhead obstacles. Move up and down between lanes to avoid rocks and collect letters. Collect every letter along the route for maximum points. Complete each stage before time runs out. The horse gallops automatically — focus on obstacle avoidance and letter collection.

Game Features

  • Side-scrolling horse-riding across the American frontier
  • Letter collection mechanic for scoring
  • Multiple regions with unique obstacles
  • Historical facts about the real Pony Express
  • Star rating system for completionists

Ride the frontier, deliver the mail, and make history. Play the Pony Express Doodle now!
intro: Ride hard across the 1860s American frontier, jumping obstacles and delivering the mail.
Collect pouches, outrun bandits, and honour the brave riders of the Pony Express.
pony-express.controls: Switch lanes to dodge obstacles or or

popcorn-box.title: Popcorn Box
popcorn-box.description:
About Popcorn Box

Popcorn Box is a satisfying physics puzzle game where you must guide popcorn kernels into a container. Arrange platforms, bumpers, and funnels to create a path from the popcorn machine to the box below. Every kernel that lands in the box counts, and you need a minimum number to pass each level. Play for free now!

Popcorn Box Gameplay

Each level presents a popcorn machine at the top and a box at the bottom, with a gap in between. You are given a set of objects — ramps, platforms, bumpers, fans, and funnels — to place in the gap. Once you are satisfied with your arrangement, press play and kernels start popping out of the machine, bouncing and rolling along your construction toward (hopefully) the box.

The physics make kernels behave unpredictably — they bounce off surfaces at odd angles, pile up against obstacles, and occasionally fly off in unexpected directions. This chaos is the game's charm: a solution that works perfectly for one kernel might scatter the next batch everywhere. Successful designs account for this randomness with wide funnels, multiple catch paths, and redundant barriers. Later levels add moving obstacles, multiple boxes, and gravity switches that flip the kernel's direction.

How to Play Popcorn Box

Drag objects from the toolbar onto the play area. Rotate objects by clicking the rotate button. Position them to create a path from the popcorn machine to the box. Press the play button to start the popcorn. Watch the kernels flow and see how many reach the box. Adjust your arrangement and try again if needed. Collect the minimum required kernels to pass each level.

Game Features

  • Physics-based puzzle construction
  • Multiple object types — ramps, bumpers, fans, funnels
  • Chaotic kernel physics that keep solutions unpredictable
  • Star rating based on kernels collected
  • Moving obstacles and gravity switches in later levels

Build the perfect path and fill that box with popcorn. Play Popcorn Box now!
intro: Pour exactly the right amount of kernels to fill the box to the brim — no more, no less.
The container changes every round; your eye for measurement is the only tool you have.
popcorn-box.controls: Pop the corn kernels or

popcorn-chef-2.title: Popcorn Chef 2
popcorn-chef-2.description:
About Popcorn Chef 2

Popcorn Chef 2 puts you behind the counter of a busy popcorn stand. Customers arrive with specific flavour orders and you must pop, season, and serve the right combinations before they lose patience and leave. Master the recipes, manage the queue, and keep the tips flowing. Play for free now!

Popcorn Chef 2 Gameplay

Each customer approaches with a thought bubble showing their desired popcorn flavour — butter, caramel, cheese, chocolate, spicy, and more. You must first pop a fresh batch in the machine, then apply the correct seasoning from your flavour station, and finally serve it to the waiting customer. Speed and accuracy are both crucial — wrong flavours waste ingredients and time.

As the game progresses, customers arrive faster and their orders grow more complex. Combo orders require multiple flavours on the same batch. VIP customers pay double tips but have half the patience. Rush hour stages throw a constant stream of customers at you simultaneously, forcing you to batch similar orders together for efficiency. Upgrades between levels let you improve your popping speed, expand your flavour selection, and increase customer patience.

How to Play Popcorn Chef 2

Click the popcorn machine to start popping a batch. Click the correct flavour station to season the popcorn. Drag the finished popcorn to the waiting customer. Match the flavour to their thought bubble order. Serve customers before their patience bar runs out. Earn tips for fast, accurate service. Spend tips on upgrades between levels.

Game Features

  • Fast-paced time-management cooking gameplay
  • Multiple popcorn flavours to master
  • Customer queue management with patience timers
  • VIP customers and rush hour challenges
  • Upgrade system for equipment and ingredients

Pop, season, and serve your way to popcorn perfection. Play Popcorn Chef 2 now!
intro: Master precision pouring across new recipes and toppings in this satisfying popcorn sequel.
More containers, more ingredients, and the same ruthless demand for accuracy.
popcorn-chef-2.controls:
Pour kernels into the jar or
Back to menu

popcorn-time.title: Popcorn Time
popcorn-time.description:
About Popcorn Time Game

Popcorn Time is a fast-paced arcade game about catching freshly popped kernels in a bucket before they hit the floor. Kernels fly out of the machine at random angles and speeds, and you must move your bucket to catch as many as possible while avoiding burnt kernels that reduce your score. Play for free now!

Popcorn Time Gameplay

A popcorn machine sits at the top of the screen, launching kernels in arcing trajectories. Your bucket at the bottom of the screen can move left and right. Golden kernels are worth standard points, while oversized kernels earn bonus points. Burnt black kernels must be avoided — catching them deducts points and can end your combo streak.

The pace increases gradually. The machine pops faster, kernels fly at steeper angles, and the mix of golden-to-burnt kernels shifts toward more burnt ones. Power-ups fall occasionally: a wider bucket makes catching easier, a magnet pulls nearby kernels toward you, and a shield lets you catch one burnt kernel without penalty. The combo system rewards consecutive catches with escalating multipliers — missing even one golden kernel resets the chain. The machine also occasionally launches special rainbow kernels worth massive points.

How to Play Popcorn Time

Move the bucket left and right using the arrow keys, A/D keys, or by dragging on mobile. Catch golden and oversized kernels for points. Avoid burnt black kernels. Collect power-ups for temporary advantages. Maintain a catch streak for combo multipliers. Watch for rainbow kernels that are worth huge bonus points. The game ends when a set number of golden kernels hit the floor.

Game Features

  • Fast-paced kernel-catching arcade action
  • Multiple kernel types with different point values
  • Power-ups — wider bucket, magnet, shield
  • Combo system for score multipliers
  • Escalating difficulty with faster popping

Keep your eyes on the sky and your bucket ready. Play Popcorn Time now!
intro: Test your eye for measurement: fill the container with exactly the right number of kernels.
The bucket size changes every round — spatial reasoning is your only guide.
popcorn-time.controls: Pop the popcorn or

real-snakesio.title: Real Snakes.io
real-snakesio.description:
About Real Snakes.io

Real Snakes.io drops you into a massive multiplayer-style arena where dozens of snakes compete for food and survival. Guide your snake through the arena, eating glowing orbs to grow longer, and use your ever-increasing length to trap and eliminate opponents. The last snake slithering wins. Play for free now!

Real Snakes.io Gameplay

Your snake glides continuously through a large open arena dotted with glowing food orbs. Eating orbs makes you longer and earns points. Other AI-controlled snakes share the arena — if your head touches any part of another snake, you are eliminated and your body turns into a trail of high-value food for other snakes to consume.

The key strategy is using your body as a weapon. Coil around smaller snakes to create an inescapable trap. Cut off opponents by crossing in front of them. Speed boost past rivals and then brake sharply, forcing them into your side. As you grow longer, your body becomes both a more powerful weapon and a greater liability — one careless turn can loop your head into your own tail. The leaderboard tracks the longest snakes, and dethroning the leader requires both skill and patience.

How to Play Real Snakes.io

Move the mouse or use the arrow keys to steer your snake. Click or press Space to activate speed boost (which consumes some of your length). Eat food orbs to grow longer. Avoid hitting other snakes with your head. Use your body to trap smaller opponents. Consume the remains of eliminated snakes for rapid growth.

Game Features

  • Massive arena with dozens of AI snake opponents
  • Grow-and-eliminate competitive gameplay
  • Speed boost mechanic with strategic trade-offs
  • Trapping and cutting-off offensive strategies
  • Leaderboard tracking the longest active snakes

Grow the longest snake and dominate the arena. Play Real Snakes.io now!
intro: Battle hundreds of other snakes in a shared arena — eat particles, grow, and cut rivals off.
The longest snake in the arena is the most dangerous and the biggest target at once.
real-snakesio.controls:
Steer your snake
Burst of speed or

retro-basketball.title: Retro Basketball
retro-basketball.description:
About Retro Basketball

Retro Basketball captures the feel of classic two-button arcade basketball with pixel-perfect presentation. Aim, time your shot, and sink baskets from increasingly difficult positions. The retro pixel art and synthesised sound effects create a nostalgic arcade atmosphere. Play for free now!

Retro Basketball Gameplay

A basketball hoop sits at the right side of the screen and your player stands at the left. An aiming arrow oscillates back and forth — press the shoot button when it points at the basket to launch the ball. The trajectory depends on both the angle and the power, which is set by a second oscillating meter.

Early rounds feature stationary hoops at close range with generous timing windows. As you progress, the hoop moves, obstacles appear between you and the basket, wind pushes the ball off course, and the timing windows shrink. Bonus rounds offer special balls — fire balls that burn through obstacles, ice balls that freeze the hoop in place, and rainbow balls that earn triple points. The retro aesthetic extends to the scoreboard, crowd animations, and half-time shows, creating an authentic arcade experience.

How to Play Retro Basketball

Press Space or click when the angle arrow points at the hoop to set your aim. Press again when the power meter is at the desired level to shoot. Watch the ball's trajectory and adjust your timing for the next shot. Account for moving hoops, wind, and obstacles in later rounds. Chain consecutive baskets for combo multipliers.

Game Features

  • Classic two-button arcade basketball mechanics
  • Angle and power oscillating meters for shot control
  • Moving hoops and obstacles in advanced rounds
  • Special ball types with unique abilities
  • Authentic retro pixel art and sound effects

Line up the perfect shot and sink basket after basket. Play Retro Basketball now!
intro: Nail the perfect release with one tap in this retro pixel basketball arcade.
The hoop shifts position after every basket — timing and arc judgement are everything.
retro-basketball.controls: Launch the ball toward the hoop

slalom-canoe.title: Slalom Canoe
slalom-canoe.description:
About Slalom Canoe

Google's 2012 Olympic Doodle celebrates slalom canoeing — the breathtaking whitewater sport where paddlers navigate a series of gates while racing against the clock. Steer your canoe through green downstream gates and red upstream gates without missing any or touching the poles. Play for free now!

Slalom Canoe Gameplay

Your canoe speeds down a river course marked with coloured gates. Green gates must be passed through in the downstream direction, while red gates require you to paddle upstream through them — a tricky manoeuvre that demands precise timing and positioning. Missing a gate adds time penalties, and touching a gate pole adds further seconds to your run.

The river current is the invisible challenge. It pushes you downstream constantly, making upstream gates particularly difficult — you must fight the current while maintaining enough control to thread through the poles. The course includes rapids sections where the current is stronger, calm pools where you can set up for the next gate, and narrow channels that require pixel-perfect navigation. Achieving a clean run with no penalties is deeply satisfying.

How to Play Slalom Canoe

Use the left and right arrow keys or A and D to steer the canoe. Alternate rapid presses to paddle faster. Navigate through green gates in the downstream direction. Navigate through red gates in the upstream direction. Avoid touching the gate poles — each touch adds a time penalty. Complete the course in the fastest time possible.

Game Features

  • Official Google Olympic Doodle for 2012
  • Realistic river current physics
  • Upstream and downstream gate navigation
  • Time penalty system for missed and touched gates
  • Clean-run challenge for perfectionist players

Navigate every gate, fight the current, and set a record time. Play Slalom Canoe now!
intro: Race through Olympic slalom gates on a roaring mountain river — miss one and your time is ruined.
Green gates must be hit in the right direction; red ones must be avoided entirely.
slalom-canoe.controls: Paddle through the gates or or

slitherio.title: Slither Snake Online (Slither.io)
slitherio.description:
About Slither.io

Slither.io took the Snake concept and turned it into a massively multiplayer experience. Hundreds of snake-like creatures slither around a shared arena, eating glowing pellets and each other's remains. The twist: even the smallest snake can eliminate the largest — size is an advantage, not a guarantee. Play for free now!

Slither.io Gameplay

Your snake moves continuously, eating small glowing pellets that dot the arena to grow longer. The arena is shared with many other snakes (AI-controlled in this version), and the core rule is simple: if your head touches any part of another snake's body, you are eliminated. Your body then becomes a trail of large, high-value pellets that other snakes race to consume.

The equalising mechanic is what makes Slither.io special. A tiny snake can eliminate a massive one by crossing its path at the right moment. This means no snake is ever truly safe, creating constant tension regardless of size. Strategic players use speed boost (which burns length) to cut off larger opponents, then feast on the remains. The arena edges act as walls — getting pushed toward the border by aggressive opponents is a common elimination tactic. The minimap shows nearby snake density, helping you choose between risky high-traffic areas and safer open spaces.

How to Play Slither.io

Move the mouse or use arrow keys to steer your snake. Click or press Space for speed boost (consumes your length). Eat small pellets to grow. Avoid hitting any snake with your head. Cut off other snakes by crossing in front of them. Eat the remains of eliminated snakes for rapid growth. Stay away from the arena edges.

Game Features

  • Multiplayer-style arena with many AI opponents
  • Equalising mechanic — any snake can eliminate any other
  • Speed boost with length-consumption trade-off
  • Strategic body-blocking and cutting-off tactics
  • Minimap for situational awareness

Grow, hunt, and survive in the ultimate snake arena. Play Slither.io now!
intro: Grow your snake in a massive multiplayer arena by eating particles and outmanoeuvring rivals.
One crash ends everything — but making a bigger snake crash into you ends them.
slitherio.controls:
Steer the worm or or
Full-speed boost

snake.title: Google Snake Game
snake.description:
About Snake Game

Snake is the timeless classic that defined a generation of mobile gaming. Guide your snake around the grid, eating food to grow longer. Every piece of food makes you longer, and every extra segment makes the game harder — one collision with the wall or your own tail and the run is over. Play for free now!

Snake Gameplay

Your snake moves continuously in the current direction. A piece of food appears at a random location on the grid — move the snake's head over it to eat it, growing one segment longer. A new food item appears immediately, and the cycle continues. The challenge escalates naturally as your snake grows: more body segments mean less empty space to navigate and more opportunities for self-collision.

The grid boundaries are walls — hitting them ends the game. As your snake grows beyond 20-30 segments, the available space shrinks dramatically and every turn becomes a calculated risk. Expert players develop path-planning strategies, mentally mapping several moves ahead to avoid boxing themselves into corners. The snake's speed often increases as you eat more food, compressing reaction time alongside shrinking space for a dual difficulty curve.

How to Play Snake

Use the arrow keys or WASD to change the snake's direction — up, down, left, right. The snake moves continuously and cannot stop or reverse. Guide the head over food items to eat them and grow. Avoid hitting the walls at the edge of the grid. Avoid colliding with your own tail. Plan your path several moves ahead to avoid trapping yourself.

Game Features

  • Timeless Snake gameplay — simple rules, deep challenge
  • Naturally escalating difficulty as the snake grows
  • Clean grid-based movement and visuals
  • Score tracking based on food consumed
  • Increasing speed for additional pressure

Eat, grow, and survive as long as you can. Play Snake now!
intro: Guide a growing snake around a grid, eat every piece of food, and never cross your own tail.
Google's Easter 2013 Doodle — a perfect revival of the game that defined Nokia phones.
snake.controls:
Steer the snake or
Restart the round

snake-fit.title: Snake Fit
snake-fit.description:
About Snake Fit

Snake Fit combines classic Snake mechanics with Tetris-style puzzle solving. Your snake slithers through a grid, but instead of simply avoiding walls, you must fit your snake's body into specific shapes outlined on the board. Match the shape to clear it and earn points. Play for free now!

Snake Fit Gameplay

The playing field contains outlined shapes — L-shapes, T-shapes, squares, and more complex patterns. Your snake moves through the grid eating food to grow, just like classic Snake. The twist is that you must manoeuvre your snake so that its body fills the outlined shape exactly. When your snake's body matches a shape, the shape clears and you earn points.

The puzzle element adds strategic depth to the familiar Snake formula. You need your snake to be exactly the right length to fill a shape, so managing your growth is critical — eat too much food and you are too long for the available shapes. Multiple shapes appear simultaneously, and you must choose which to fill based on your current length and position. Later levels introduce shapes that move, rotate, or disappear after a time limit, adding urgency to the puzzle-solving.

How to Play Snake Fit

Use the arrow keys or WASD to steer the snake around the grid. Eat food to grow to the needed length. Navigate your snake so its body fills an outlined shape on the board. When the shape is perfectly filled, it clears for points. Avoid hitting walls or your own tail. Manage your snake's length to match available shapes.

Game Features

  • Innovative Snake-meets-Tetris puzzle mechanic
  • Shape-matching challenges requiring length management
  • Multiple simultaneous shapes to prioritise
  • Time-limited and moving shapes in later levels
  • Classic Snake controls with a strategic twist

Slither, grow, and fit the shapes perfectly. Play Snake Fit now!
intro: Fill every tile in the room with your snake's body — a clever puzzle twist on the classic.
One wrong move and the grid locks up. Think several steps ahead every time.
snake-fit.controls:
Guide the snake or
Switch character
Advance to the next level

snake-football.title: Snake Football
snake-football.description:
About Snake Football

Snake Football fuses the classic Snake game with football mechanics for an unexpected and addictive combination. Your snake slithers across a football pitch, eating the ball and guiding it toward the opponent's goal. Score goals while growing longer and dodging the opposing snake. Play for free now!

Snake Football Gameplay

Two snakes — yours and the AI opponent's — compete on a football pitch with goals at each end. A ball sits on the pitch, and whichever snake touches it gains possession. With the ball attached to your head, slither toward the opponent's goal to score. The AI snake tries to intercept, block your path, and steal the ball.

The Snake mechanics create unique football dynamics. As both snakes grow longer (from eating power-up food scattered on the pitch), the playing space shrinks and manoeuvrability decreases. Long snakes can block entire sections of the pitch, creating natural defensive walls. Skilled players use their own body as a barrier in front of their goal while attacking with their head. Power-ups include speed boosts, length reduction (strategically useful), and a freeze power that temporarily immobilises the opponent.

How to Play Snake Football

Use the arrow keys or WASD to steer your snake. Touch the ball to gain possession. Guide the ball into the opponent's goal to score. Eat food items on the pitch to grow and earn power-ups. Avoid colliding with the opponent's body or your own tail. Block the AI snake from your goal using your body length. First to five goals wins the match.

Game Features

  • Unique Snake-meets-football hybrid gameplay
  • AI opponent with competitive goal-scoring behaviour
  • Strategic body-blocking defensive mechanics
  • Power-ups including speed boost and freeze
  • Best-of-five match format

Slither, score, and defend your way to victory. Play Snake Football now!
intro: Two snakes play football — grow your serpent, manoeuvre the ball, and score three goals.
Every second you survive makes the pitch more chaotic — and the match more hilarious.
snake-football.controls: Steer the snake

snake1.title: Snake
snake1.description:
About Snake Classic

Snake Classic is a faithful recreation of the Nokia mobile phone game that defined an entire era of handheld gaming. The chunky pixel grid, the satisfying beep of eating food, and the ever-growing challenge of navigating your own tail — it is all here, exactly as millions remember it. Play for free now!

Snake Classic Gameplay

The snake moves in four directions on a bordered grid. A single piece of food appears at a random position — eat it, grow one segment, and a new piece spawns. The bordered grid means all four edges are walls, and touching any wall ends the game immediately. As your snake grows, the empty space shrinks and every direction change becomes a potential self-collision.

This version faithfully replicates the Nokia experience — the grid size, the movement speed, the growth rate, and even the visual style mirror the original. The simplicity is the point: no power-ups, no enemies, no gimmicks — just you, the food, and the ever-growing challenge of your own success. High scores above 50 segments require genuine path-planning skill, and scores above 100 are legendary. The addictive one-more-try quality that made the original a phenomenon is fully intact.

How to Play Snake Classic

Use the arrow keys to change direction — up, down, left, right. The snake cannot reverse direction (pressing the opposite direction does nothing). Eat the food to grow one segment and score one point. Avoid the walls on all four sides. Avoid colliding with any part of your own body. Plan your path ahead to prevent trapping yourself in corners.

Game Features

  • Faithful Nokia-style Snake recreation
  • Classic bordered grid with wall boundaries
  • Pure gameplay with no power-ups or gimmicks
  • Progressive difficulty from your own growing body
  • Nostalgic pixel art and sound design

Relive the classic and chase the ultimate high score. Play Snake Classic now!
intro: Eat apples, grow longer, and never cross your own tail — the original Snake, unchanged.
Simple enough to learn in ten seconds. Impossible to truly master.
snake1.controls:
Player 1
Steer the snake (Player 1) or

soccer-2012.title: Soccer 2012
soccer-2012.description:
About Soccer 2012 Google Doodle

Released for the 2012 London Olympics, this Google Doodle puts you in goal for a series of increasingly difficult penalty kicks. Read the striker's approach, choose your dive direction, and make the save. The further you get, the craftier the opposing strikers become. Play for free now!

Soccer 2012 Gameplay

You control the goalkeeper, standing on the line as strikers approach one by one. Each striker winds up and fires a penalty kick, and you must dive in the correct direction to make the save. Early strikers telegraph their shots with obvious run-up angles, but as the rounds progress, the shots become harder to read — disguised run-ups, delayed strikes, and deceptive body language make each save feel earned.

The timing of your dive matters as much as the direction. Dive too early and the striker can redirect. Dive too late and the ball is in the net before you move. The sweet spot requires reading the striker's approach and committing at the last possible moment. Consecutive saves build a streak bonus that multiplies your score. The pixelated Olympic stadium setting and enthusiastic crowd add atmosphere to every penalty.

How to Play Soccer 2012 Doodle

Press the left arrow to dive left, right arrow to dive right, or up arrow to jump up. On mobile, swipe in the desired direction. Time your dive to match the moment the striker kicks. Watch the striker's run-up angle and body position for clues. Consecutive saves earn streak bonuses. The game ends when you concede a goal.

Game Features

  • Official 2012 Olympics Google Doodle
  • Goalkeeper penalty-saving action
  • Increasingly deceptive AI strikers
  • Dive timing and direction mechanics
  • Streak bonus scoring system

Stand tall between the posts and save every penalty. Play Soccer 2012 Doodle now!
intro: Dive left or right and save penalties in Google's London 2012 Olympics goalkeeper Doodle.
Later rounds add pace and placement — only the sharpest reflexes survive.
soccer-2012.controls:
Move the goalkeeper or
Dive / jump or or

solitaire.title: Google Solitaire
solitaire.description:
About Solitaire

Solitaire — also known as Klondike — is the quintessential single-player card game that has been a desktop computer staple since 1990. Draw from the stock, build foundation piles from Ace to King by suit, and arrange the tableau in descending alternating colours. It is meditative, strategic, and endlessly replayable. Play for free now!

Solitaire Gameplay

Seven tableau columns are dealt with increasing numbers of cards — one in the first column, two in the second, up to seven in the seventh. Only the top card of each column is face up. The remaining cards form the stock pile. Your goal is to move all 52 cards onto four foundation piles, one per suit, building from Ace up to King.

Move cards between tableau columns by placing them in descending order with alternating colours (red on black, black on red). Turning over face-down cards by clearing the cards above them is essential for progress. Draw from the stock when no tableau moves are available. Kings can be placed in empty tableau columns, creating new building opportunities. The strategic tension lies in choosing which moves to make first — sometimes the obvious move blocks a better sequence deeper in the tableau.

How to Play Solitaire

Click or drag cards to move them between tableau columns. Place cards in descending order with alternating colours. Move Aces to the foundation piles and build up by suit. Click the stock pile to draw new cards. Place Kings in empty tableau columns. Double-click a card to auto-move it to the foundation if possible. Clear all cards to the foundations to win.

Game Features

  • Classic Klondike Solitaire rules
  • Smooth drag-and-drop card movement
  • Auto-complete feature for endgame
  • Move counter and timer for competitive play
  • Undo function for strategic exploration

Deal the cards, plan your moves, and clear the board. Play Solitaire now!
intro: Classic Klondike Solitaire in Google's clean, no-fuss browser implementation.
Draw one or three, build your foundations, and clear the deck with pure focus.
solitaire.controls: Drag cards to build stacks

space-invaders-google.title: Space Invaders Google
space-invaders-google.description:
About Space Invaders

Space Invaders, the 1978 arcade masterpiece by Tomohiro Nishikado, defined the shoot-em-up genre and became a cultural icon. Rows of alien invaders march across the screen, descending toward your cannon. Shoot them all before they reach the bottom. This browser version faithfully recreates the arcade experience. Play for free now!

Space Invaders Gameplay

Five rows of aliens march in formation across the screen, shifting one step down each time they reach a wall. Your laser cannon sits at the bottom, moving left and right behind four destructible shields. Fire upward to destroy aliens one at a time — each destroyed alien earns points, with higher rows worth more. The aliens fire back with random shots that you must dodge.

As you destroy aliens, the remaining formation speeds up — a mechanic that creates mounting tension. The final few aliens zip across the screen at alarming speed, making them surprisingly difficult to hit. The UFO that occasionally crosses the top of the screen offers massive bonus points but moves quickly and appears unpredictably. Your shields absorb both alien shots and your own fire, gradually crumbling from both directions. Managing shield integrity is a subtle but important strategic element.

How to Play Space Invaders

Use the left and right arrow keys or A and D to move your cannon. Press Space or the up arrow to fire. Shoot the marching aliens before they reach the bottom. Dodge incoming alien fire. Use shields for cover — but remember they degrade over time. Shoot the bonus UFO crossing the top for extra points. Clear all aliens to advance to the next wave.

Game Features

  • Faithful recreation of the 1978 arcade classic
  • Five rows of aliens with escalating speed
  • Destructible shields for strategic cover
  • Bonus UFO for high-risk, high-reward points
  • Classic pixel art and iconic sound effects

Defend Earth from the alien invasion. Play Space Invaders now!
intro: Blast descending alien rows before they reach Earth — the arcade classic reimagined.
The fleet speeds up as it shrinks; the last alien is always the hardest.
space-invaders-google.controls:
Move the cannon
Fire
Pause
Quit
Lower resolution

stickman-hook.title: Stickman Hook
stickman-hook.description:
About Stickman Hook

Stickman Hook is a physics-based swinging game where your ragdoll stickman swings from hook to hook across obstacle-filled courses. Time your grabs, build momentum, and release at the perfect moment to launch across gaps and reach the finish line. Play for free now!

Stickman Hook Gameplay

Hooks are scattered across each level, and your stickman can grab onto any one within range. While attached, you swing in an arc, building momentum with each swing. Release the hook at the right moment and your stickman flies through the air toward the next hook. Chain swings together to maintain speed and traverse the level without touching the ground.

The physics are the star of the show. Swing too high and you float past the next hook's range. Swing too low and you crash into obstacles below. The perfect release angle launches you in a graceful arc directly to the next hook. Advanced levels introduce moving hooks, disappearing hooks, bouncing surfaces, and gravity zones that alter your trajectory. The stickman's ragdoll animation adds comedy to every crash and triumph alike.

How to Play Stickman Hook

Click, tap, or press Space to grab the nearest hook. Release to let go and fly through the air. Grab the next hook to continue swinging. Build momentum by swinging a full arc before releasing. Time your grabs to maintain speed across the level. Avoid obstacles and the ground. Reach the finish line flag to complete each level.

Game Features

  • Satisfying physics-based swinging mechanics
  • Ragdoll stickman animation for comedy and spectacle
  • Dozens of levels with escalating complexity
  • Moving, disappearing, and bouncing hooks
  • One-button gameplay — simple to learn, hard to master

Swing, fly, and stick the landing on every level. Play Stickman Hook now!

stickman-party.title: Stickman party
stickman-party.description:
About Stickman Party

Stickman Party is a collection of multiplayer mini-games starring colourful stickman characters. From tank battles and platformer races to quiz games and survival challenges, every mini-game is designed for fun local competition. Grab a friend and settle who is the ultimate stickman champion. Play for free now!

Stickman Party Gameplay

The game rotates through a variety of mini-games, each lasting 30 to 90 seconds. Tank Battles has players driving tiny tanks and shooting each other on destructible terrain. Lava Floor is a platformer race where the ground steadily rises as lava. Sumo Push puts two stickmen on a small platform trying to knock each other off. Each mini-game has simple, unique controls explained before the round begins.

Points are awarded based on performance in each mini-game — first place gets the most, last place gets the least. After a set number of rounds, the player with the most total points wins the party. The variety keeps every session fresh — you might dominate the shooting games but struggle at the puzzle challenges, creating natural balance between players of different skill sets. The stickman art style keeps the visuals clean and the focus on gameplay.

How to Play Stickman Party

Controls change per mini-game and are shown before each round. Generally, use the arrow keys or WASD to move. Action buttons vary — Space for shooting games, specific keys for interactions. Follow the on-screen instructions at the start of each mini-game. Score the most points across all rounds to win the party. Play solo against AI or locally with friends.

Game Features

  • Dozens of varied mini-games in one package
  • Local multiplayer for competitive fun
  • Simple controls with quick tutorials per game
  • Cumulative scoring across rounds
  • Colourful stickman art style

Challenge your friends to the ultimate stickman showdown. Play Stickman Party now!

swing-dancing-and-the-savoy-ballroom.title: Swing Dancing And The Savoy Ballroom!
swing-dancing-and-the-savoy-ballroom.description:
About Swing Dancing & the Savoy Ballroom

This Google Doodle celebrates the Savoy Ballroom — the legendary Harlem dance hall where swing dancing was born in the 1920s and 1930s. The interactive experience lets you explore the history of swing through animated dance sequences and discover the cultural significance of this groundbreaking venue. Play for free now!

Savoy Ballroom Doodle Gameplay

The Doodle presents an animated ballroom scene where dancers perform classic swing moves — the Lindy Hop, the Charleston, aerial throws, and more. Click on different elements of the scene to trigger new dance sequences and learn about the moves and the dancers who popularised them. The animation quality is exceptional, capturing the energy and joy of swing dancing.

Historical panels appear between sequences, telling the story of the Savoy Ballroom — how it was one of the first racially integrated public venues in America, how it launched careers of legendary dancers like Frankie Manning and Norma Miller, and how the dances created there spread across the world. The Doodle beautifully connects the art of dance to its cultural and social context, making it both entertaining and educational.

How to Play Savoy Ballroom Doodle

Click or tap on dancers to trigger dance sequences. Click on different areas of the ballroom to discover new moves and animations. Read the historical panels that appear between sequences. Explore every interactive element to experience the full history of swing dancing. The experience progresses through different eras of the Savoy's history as you interact.

Game Features

  • Beautifully animated swing dance sequences
  • Historical exploration of the Savoy Ballroom
  • Multiple dance styles — Lindy Hop, Charleston, aerials
  • Educational content about racial integration in culture
  • Stories of legendary dancers and their contributions

Step into the Savoy and discover the birthplace of swing. Play the Savoy Ballroom Doodle now!

The Savoy Ballroom was the birthplace of swing — feel the music and keep the combo alive.

About T-Rex Run 3D

T-Rex Run 3D takes Chrome's beloved side-scrolling dinosaur game and transforms it into a fully three-dimensional endless runner. Your T-Rex sprints through a vibrant 3D desert landscape, leaping over cacti, dodging rocks, and ducking under flying obstacles — all rendered in colourful low-poly graphics. Play for free now!

T-Rex Run 3D Gameplay

The T-Rex runs automatically down a three-lane 3D desert highway. Obstacles appear on the road — cacti clusters, rock formations, low-flying pterodactyls, and gaps in the road. Switch lanes to avoid obstacles, jump to clear ground hazards, and duck to pass under aerial threats. The 3D perspective adds depth perception challenges not present in the original 2D version.

Speed increases steadily, compressing reaction times and making obstacle avoidance increasingly frantic. The 3D environment introduces new hazard types impossible in 2D — boulders that roll across multiple lanes, pterodactyl flocks that occupy two lanes simultaneously, and ramps that launch you into the air for bonus coin collection. Power-ups include a magnet that pulls coins toward you, a shield that absorbs one collision, and a score multiplier that doubles points for a limited time.

How to Play T-Rex Run 3D

Use the left and right arrow keys or A and D to switch lanes. Press Space or the up arrow to jump. Press the down arrow or S to duck. Collect coins scattered along the road. Grab power-ups for temporary advantages. Avoid cacti, rocks, and flying obstacles. Survive as long as possible for the highest score.

Game Features

  • 3D reimagining of Chrome's beloved T-Rex runner
  • Three-lane gameplay with lane-switching mechanics
  • Low-poly 3D desert environment with vibrant colours
  • Power-ups — magnet, shield, and score multiplier
  • New obstacle types exclusive to the 3D format

Run through the desert in full 3D. Play T-Rex Run 3D now!

table-tennis-world-tour.title: Table Tennis World Tour
table-tennis-world-tour.description:
About Table Tennis World Tour

Table Tennis World Tour brings the fast-paced action of ping pong to your browser with responsive paddle controls and increasingly skilled AI opponents. Rally, spin, smash, and place your shots to outplay opponents from around the world and claim the championship. Play for free now!

Table Tennis World Tour Gameplay

You control a paddle at one end of the table, facing an AI opponent. The ball bounces back and forth, and you must position your paddle and time your swing to return every shot. The direction and speed of your return depend on where the ball hits your paddle and the timing of your swing — early hits go cross-court, late hits go down the line.

Each opponent in the world tour has a distinct playing style. Some rely on powerful smashes, others use tricky spin shots, and the best combine both with unpredictable placement. As you progress through the tournament brackets, opponents react faster, return harder shots, and exploit your weaknesses. Learning to read the ball's spin (shown by its rotation animation) and adjust your paddle angle accordingly is the key skill that separates casual rallying from competitive play.

How to Play Table Tennis World Tour

Move the mouse or use arrow keys to position your paddle. Click or press Space to swing. Swing timing affects shot direction — early for cross-court, late for down the line. Move the paddle up for topspin, down for backspin. Position near the edge for angled shots. Win points by landing the ball on the opponent's side when they miss. First to eleven points wins the set.

Game Features

  • Responsive paddle controls with directional shot-making
  • World tour mode with opponents from different countries
  • Spin mechanics — topspin, backspin, and side-spin
  • AI opponents with distinct playing styles
  • Tournament bracket progression

Master spin, placement, and power to win the world tour. Play Table Tennis World Tour now!
intro: Rally, read spins, and win tournaments against world-class ping-pong players worldwide.
Time your counter-attack, vary your placement, and break your opponent's rhythm to advance.

tap-tap-goal.title: Tap Tap Goal
tap-tap-goal.description:
About Tap Tap Goal

Tap Tap Goal is a one-touch football game where precise timing is everything. Tap at the exact right moment to pass, shoot, and score spectacular goals. String together perfectly timed passes to build attacks and beat the goalkeeper with clinical finishing. Play for free now!

Tap Tap Goal Gameplay

Your team attacks automatically, with players making runs and moving into position. A pulsing circle around the ball-carrier indicates the timing window — tap when the circle is at its smallest for a perfect pass or shot. Perfect timing sends the ball exactly where you need it; mistimed taps result in wayward passes or weak shots that the goalkeeper saves easily.

Each level presents a different attacking scenario — through balls, crosses, one-twos, long-range shots, and free kicks. The defensive formations become more compact and the goalkeeper becomes better at reading shots as levels progress. Bonus challenges require scoring in specific ways — volleys, headers, or goals from outside the box — for extra stars. The rhythm of timing taps creates an almost musical flow when you chain perfect passes into a stunning goal.

How to Play Tap Tap Goal

Tap the screen or click the mouse when the timing circle reaches its smallest point. Perfect timing creates accurate passes and powerful shots. Mistimed taps result in errors. Chain passes together to build attacks. The final tap shoots at goal — aim for perfection. Complete each scenario to progress. Earn bonus stars for special goal types.

Game Features

  • One-touch timing-based football mechanics
  • Diverse attacking scenarios — through balls, crosses, free kicks
  • Perfect-timing system with visual feedback
  • Progressive difficulty with better defences
  • Bonus star challenges for specific goal types

Time your taps, thread the passes, and score the perfect goal. Play Tap Tap Goal now!

Keep the rally going and rack up goals before you fluff a kick.

temple-of-boom.title: Temple Of Boom 🕹️ Game Temple of Boom free
temple-of-boom.description:
About Temple of Boom

Temple of Boom is an explosive platformer-shooter set inside a trap-filled ancient temple. Fight waves of monsters, collect powerful weapons, and battle your way deeper into the temple to face terrifying bosses. The pixel art is gorgeous, the action is relentless, and the weapon variety keeps combat fresh. Play for free now!

Temple of Boom Gameplay

Your character navigates multi-tiered temple rooms filled with monsters — skeletons, demons, bats, and undead warriors. Shoot them with an arsenal of weapons found throughout the temple: pistols, shotguns, machine guns, rocket launchers, and more. Each weapon has distinct characteristics — shotguns devastate at close range, machine guns spray bullets for crowd control, and rocket launchers clear entire platforms.

The temple rooms are interconnected mazes with vertical and horizontal platforming. Jump between platforms, drop through gaps, and use ladders to navigate while fighting enemies on every surface. Boss battles punctuate the exploration with massive creatures that require pattern recognition and sustained fire to defeat. Health pickups and ammo crates are scattered throughout, but resource management matters — spraying bullets carelessly leaves you clicking an empty gun when you need it most.

How to Play Temple of Boom

Use A and D or arrow keys to move left and right. Press W or the up arrow to jump. Press S or the down arrow to drop through platforms. Click the mouse to shoot in the aimed direction. Press E or F to pick up weapons and items. Switch weapons with the number keys or scroll wheel. Defeat all enemies in a room to unlock the exits. Find and defeat the boss to progress.

Game Features

  • Platformer-shooter action in a trap-filled temple
  • Diverse weapon arsenal with distinct characteristics
  • Multi-tiered level design with vertical exploration
  • Boss battles requiring pattern recognition
  • Gorgeous pixel art and atmospheric music

Grab a gun, fight the monsters, and conquer the temple. Play Temple of Boom now!

temple-run-2.title: Temple Run 2

About Temple Run 2

Temple Run 2 is the sequel to one of mobile gaming's biggest hits. Sprint through ancient temple ruins, sliding under obstacles, jumping over gaps, and tilting around sharp corners while a demon monkey chases you relentlessly. The run never ends — how far can you go? Play for free now!

Temple Run 2 Gameplay

Your character runs automatically through a winding path of crumbling temple ruins. The path twists, turns, rises, and drops with obstacles at every point — low barriers require sliding, gaps require jumping, and forked paths require split-second lane-change decisions. The demon monkey behind you means stopping is not an option.

Coins line the running path and collecting them unlocks upgrades, power-ups, and new characters. Power-ups appear during runs: the shield protects against one mistake, the coin magnet pulls nearby coins toward you, the boost launches you forward at extreme speed, and the score multiplier doubles your distance points. The environments change as you progress — lush forests give way to mine shafts, water slides, and cliffside paths, each with unique obstacles and visual themes. The leaderboard tracks your best distance, encouraging constant improvement.

How to Play Temple Run 2

Swipe up or press the up arrow to jump. Swipe down or press the down arrow to slide under obstacles. Swipe left or right or use arrow keys to turn at corners and switch lanes. Tilt your device or use A and D to lean around curves. Collect coins along the path. Grab power-ups for temporary advantages. Run as far as possible without crashing.

Game Features

  • Endless running through stunning temple environments
  • Intuitive swipe or keyboard controls
  • Multiple environments with unique obstacles
  • Power-up system — shield, magnet, boost, multiplier
  • Character and upgrade unlocks with collected coins

Outrun the demon monkey and set a new distance record. Play Temple Run 2 now!

the-mergest-kingdom.title: The Mergest Kingdom
the-mergest-kingdom.description:
About The Mergest Kingdom

The Mergest Kingdom combines match-three mechanics with kingdom-building strategy. Merge identical items on a grid to create upgraded versions — three bushes become a tree, three trees become a grove, three groves become a forest. Use your merged resources to expand your kingdom and restore it to its former glory. Play for free now!

The Mergest Kingdom Gameplay

Your kingdom starts as a small patch of land with a few basic items. Drag and drop identical items together in groups of three to merge them into a single upgraded item. Upgraded items can be merged again into even higher-tier versions. Resources generated by merged structures — wood from trees, stone from quarries, food from farms — power the expansion of your kingdom.

As your kingdom grows, you unlock new areas of the map covered in fog. Clearing the fog reveals new items to merge, new structures to build, and new challenges to overcome. Quest chains guide your progress, asking you to create specific merged items or build particular structures. The satisfaction of watching three basic huts merge into a cottage, then three cottages into a house, then three houses into a mansion creates a compelling progression that keeps you merging for hours.

How to Play The Mergest Kingdom

Drag items onto matching items to merge three-of-a-kind into an upgraded version. Tap merged structures to collect resources. Use resources to unlock new land tiles. Follow quest objectives for guided progression. Explore newly revealed map areas for fresh items and challenges. Keep merging to reach the highest-tier versions of every item.

Game Features

  • Addictive merge-three puzzle mechanics
  • Kingdom-building with expanding territory
  • Deep item progression chains from basic to legendary
  • Quest system for guided objectives
  • Fog-covered map to explore and reveal

Merge, build, and expand your kingdom to greatness. Play The Mergest Kingdom now!

the-scale-of-the-universe-online.title: The Scale of the Universe Online
the-scale-of-the-universe-online.description:
About The Scale of the Universe

The Scale of the Universe is a mind-blowing interactive exploration of size — from the tiniest subatomic particles to the observable universe itself. Zoom in and out through 62 orders of magnitude, discovering objects at every scale with fascinating descriptions. It is educational, beautiful, and profoundly humbling. Play for free now!

Scale of the Universe Gameplay

A horizontal slider lets you zoom from the smallest known things (quantum foam at 10⁻³⁵ metres) to the largest (the observable universe at 10²⁷ metres). At each scale, illustrated objects appear with labels — quarks, atoms, molecules, cells, insects, humans, buildings, mountains, planets, stars, galaxies, and beyond. Click on any object to read a detailed description of its size and significance.

The experience is less a game and more an interactive encyclopaedia of scale, but the sense of discovery as you zoom is genuinely thrilling. The transition from human-scale objects to cellular biology, then to atomic structure, then to subatomic particles creates a vertiginous sense of how much exists beyond our perception. Zooming outward past Earth to the solar system, the Milky Way, and the cosmic web is equally awe-inspiring. Every object includes a fascinating factoid that contextualises its size.

How to Play Scale of the Universe

Use the scroll wheel or drag the slider to zoom in and out. Click on any object to read its description. Zoom all the way in to reach quantum foam. Zoom all the way out to see the observable universe. Explore every scale between the two extremes. Read the descriptions to learn about the size and significance of each object.

Game Features

  • 62 orders of magnitude from quantum foam to the universe
  • Hundreds of illustrated objects with descriptions
  • Smooth zooming with intuitive scroll controls
  • Educational content about physics, biology, and astronomy
  • Beautiful illustrations at every scale

Explore the universe from the smallest particle to the largest structure. Play The Scale of the Universe now!

A humbling, beautiful journey through 60 orders of magnitude.

tic-tac-toe.title: Google Tic-Tac-Toe
tic-tac-toe.description:
About Tic Tac Toe

Tic Tac Toe is the timeless strategy game of Xs and Os. Take turns placing your mark on a 3×3 grid, aiming to get three in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — before your opponent does. Simple to learn, surprisingly deep to master, and perfect for quick competitive sessions. Play for free now!

Tic Tac Toe Gameplay

Two players alternate placing their marks (X or O) on a 3×3 grid. The first player to align three marks in any row, column, or diagonal wins the round. If all nine squares are filled without a winner, the game is a draw. Against the AI, the computer plays with perfect or near-perfect strategy depending on the difficulty level.

While Tic Tac Toe on a 3×3 grid is theoretically solvable (optimal play by both sides always results in a draw), the AI difficulty settings create genuine challenge. Easy mode makes occasional mistakes that observant players can exploit. Medium mode plays well but leaves openings. Hard mode plays perfectly — beating it requires the AI to make no mistakes, which means draws are the best possible outcome. The game also offers 4×4 and 5×5 grid variants that add significant strategic complexity.

How to Play Tic Tac Toe

Click or tap on an empty square to place your mark. X always goes first. Try to align three of your marks in a row, column, or diagonal. Block your opponent from completing their line. Corner squares are strategically strongest in the opening. The centre square is the most versatile position. Take turns until someone wins or the board is full.

Game Features

  • Classic 3×3 Tic Tac Toe with AI opponent
  • Multiple difficulty levels — easy, medium, and hard
  • Two-player local multiplayer mode
  • 4×4 and 5×5 grid variants for added depth
  • Win/loss/draw tracking across sessions

Can you beat the perfect AI? Take on the challenge. Play Tic Tac Toe now!

Simple enough to teach a child. Surprisingly deep when played against a well-programmed opponent.

toilet-rush.title: Toilet Rush
toilet-rush.description:
About Toilet Rush

Toilet Rush is a frantic puzzle game with a hilariously urgent premise — your character desperately needs the bathroom, and every level is a maze of obstacles between them and the toilet. Clear the path by solving environmental puzzles before time (and patience) runs out. Play for free now!

Toilet Rush Gameplay

Each level presents a top-down room with your character at one end and a toilet at the other. Between them are obstacles — locked doors, furniture, sleeping guards, moving hazards, and maze-like corridors. Interact with objects in the correct order to clear a path: find keys, move furniture, distract guards, and activate switches to open doors.

The urgency meter adds constant pressure. Your character's desperation increases over time, shown by increasingly frantic animations and a depleting patience bar. Solve the puzzle too slowly and the run ends in humiliating failure. Later levels combine multiple puzzle types — find a key to open a door, then move a couch to reveal a vent, then crawl through the vent past a guard. The absurd premise and slapstick animations keep the tone light and genuinely funny despite the time pressure.

How to Play Toilet Rush

Tap or click on objects to interact with them — pick up keys, move furniture, press buttons. Guide your character through the cleared path toward the toilet. Solve puzzles in the correct order to open the route. Watch the urgency meter — solve the puzzle before it runs out. Some objects require dragging to specific positions. Complete each level to unlock the next increasingly complex room.

Game Features

  • Hilariously urgent puzzle premise
  • Environmental puzzle-solving with multiple interaction types
  • Urgency meter adding constant time pressure
  • Increasingly complex room layouts
  • Slapstick animations and comedic character reactions

uno-online.title: Uno Multiplayer Online
uno-online.description:
About UNO Online

UNO Online brings the world's most popular card game to your browser. Match cards by colour or number, play action cards to disrupt your opponents, and race to empty your hand first. The classic rules — Draw Two, Skip, Reverse, and the devastating Wild Draw Four — are all here. Play for free now!

UNO Online Gameplay

Each player starts with seven cards. On your turn, play a card that matches the current discard pile's colour or number. If you cannot play, draw a card from the deck. Action cards change the flow — Skip jumps the next player, Reverse changes the direction of play, Draw Two forces the next player to draw two cards and lose their turn, and Wild cards let you change the active colour.

The Wild Draw Four is the most powerful card in the game — it changes the colour and forces the next player to draw four cards. However, it can only legally be played when you have no other playable cards (though most games allow bluffing). When you are down to one card, you must shout "UNO" (click the UNO button) — failure to do so before another player catches you results in drawing two penalty cards. The AI opponents range from predictable beginners to strategic experts who save action cards for devastating combos.

How to Play UNO Online

Click on a card in your hand to play it if it matches the discard pile's colour or number. Click the draw pile to draw a card when you cannot play. Press the UNO button when you have one card remaining. Choose a colour when playing Wild cards. Strategically save action cards for critical moments. Empty your hand before all other players to win the round.

Game Features

  • Official UNO rules with all action cards
  • AI opponents with varying skill levels
  • UNO button mechanic with penalty enforcement
  • Wild and Wild Draw Four strategic gameplay
  • Score tracking across multiple rounds

Match, skip, reverse, and play your way to victory. Play UNO Online now!

First player to empty their hand wins. Your rivals will do everything possible to prevent it.

zuma-deluxe.title: Zuma Deluxe
zuma-deluxe.description:
About Zuma Deluxe

Zuma Deluxe is the legendary marble-shooting puzzle game where you fire coloured balls into a moving chain to create matches of three or more. The chain of marbles snakes toward a skull at the end of the path — clear them all before they reach it or face defeat. Play for free now!

Zuma Deluxe Gameplay

A chain of coloured marbles rolls along a winding path toward a golden skull. You control a stone frog at the centre of the screen that shoots coloured marbles from its mouth. Aim and fire into the chain to insert your marble — when three or more adjacent marbles of the same colour form a group, they explode and disappear. Clear the entire chain to complete the level.

Strategic shooting creates chain reactions: when a group explodes, the remaining chain snaps together, and if the newly adjacent marbles match, they explode too — creating cascading combos worth massive bonus points. The marble in the frog's mouth and the next marble in the queue are visible, letting you plan two shots ahead. Power-up marbles appear occasionally: the accuracy shot slows time, the backwards ball reverses the chain's movement, and the explosion ball destroys all marbles in a radius. Later levels feature faster chains, longer paths, and multiple chains entering from different directions simultaneously.

How to Play Zuma Deluxe

Move the mouse to aim the frog. Click to fire a marble into the chain. Match three or more same-coloured marbles to eliminate them. Press Space or right-click to swap between the current marble and the queued marble. Create chain reactions by eliminating groups that cause new matches. Clear the entire marble chain before it reaches the skull. Grab power-up marbles for special abilities.

Game Features

  • Classic marble-shooting chain-matching gameplay
  • Chain reaction combos for massive points
  • Power-up marbles — accuracy, reversal, explosion
  • Multiple winding paths with increasing complexity
  • Beautiful Aztec-themed art and atmospheric soundtrack

Aim, shoot, and shatter every chain before it reaches the skull. Play Zuma Deluxe now!
intro: Match coloured balls to destroy the chain before it rolls into the skull-shaped pit.
Aim your stone frog launcher, create groups of three, and beat back the endless advance.
